I need you to analyze my entire Next.js project and provide a detailed refactoring plan.

**Project Context:**
The project is a university assignment called "RentMate," a smart rental property management system.
- **Tech Stack:** The frontend is built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript. The backend is a separate Spring Boot API.
- **Core Features:** The application connects landlords and tenants. Key features include property listings with search/filters, secure in-app messaging, rent payment tracking, maintenance request management, and document storage.
- **User Roles:** There are at least two primary user roles: "Landlord" and "Tenant," each requiring a distinct dashboard and user flow after logging in.

**The Problem:**
My current frontend codebase is poorly organized. The file structure is messy, components are not well-designed, and the overall UI/UX is confusing and visually unappealing.

**Your Task:**
Please review the entire `/src` directory of my project and provide a comprehensive action plan to improve it. Specifically, I need you to:

1. **Critique the Current Codebase:**
 - Analyze my current folder and file structure. Point out what is wrong with it.
 - Identify components that are too large, handle too much logic, or are not reusable.
 - Review my state management strategy (e.g., use of `useState`, props drilling) and identify any problems.

2. **Propose a Refactoring Plan:**
 - **New File Structure:** Recommend a clean, scalable folder structure for a Next.js App Router project. Please provide this as a visual tree diagram. Include folders for `components`, `lib`, `app`, `types`, etc.
 - **Component Refactoring:** Provide specific examples of how to break down my large components into smaller, single-purpose, reusable components.
 - **UI/UX Overhaul:** Recommend a modern UI library (like **Shadcn/ui**, **Mantine**, or **Material UI**) that would be suitable for this project's dashboards and forms. Provide concrete examples of how to replace my current UI elements with components from that library to improve the look and feel.
 - **State Management:** Suggest a robust state management solution (e.g., React Context, Zustand) to handle global state like user authentication status and role. Explain why it's a good fit.

3. **Provide Code Examples:**
 - Show "before" and "after" code snippets for key refactoring suggestions so I can clearly understand how to implement the changes.

Please format your response using clear headings and markdown for readability.

 1	import { useEffect } from 'react';
 2	import Router from 'next/router';
 3	import Head from 'next/head';
 4	import NProgress from 'nprogress';
 5	import { ChakraProvider } from '@chakra-ui/react';
 6	
 7	import Layout from '../components/Layout';
 8	import 'nprogress/nprogress.css';
 9	
 10	function MyApp({ Component, pageProps }) {
 11	 const getLayout = Component.getLayout || ((page) => <Layout>{page}</Layout>);
 12	
 13	 useEffect(() => {
 14	 NProgress.configure({ showSpinner: false });
 15	
 16	 const handleStart = () => NProgress.start();
 17	 const handleStop = () => NProgress.done(); 
 18	
 19	 Router.events.on('routeChangeStart', handleStart);
 20	 Router.events.on('routeChangeComplete', handleStop);
 21	 Router.events.on('routeChangeError', handleStop);
 22	
 23	 return () => {
 24	 Router.events.off('routeChangeStart', handleStart);
 25	 Router.events.off('routeChangeComplete', handleStop);
 26	 Router.events.off('routeChangeError', handleStop);
 27	 };
 28	 }, []);
 29	
 30	 return (
 31	 <ChakraProvider>
 32	 {getLayout(<Component {...pageProps} />)}
 33	 </ChakraProvider>
 34	 );
 35	}
 36	
 37	export default MyApp;

 1	import Image from 'next/image';
 2	import { Flex, Box, Text, Button, SlideFade } from '@chakra-ui/react';
 3	import { useRouter } from 'next/router';
 4	import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
 5	import Property from '../components/Property';
 6	import SearchFilters from '../components/SearchFilters';
 7	import { mockProperties } from '../utils/mockProperties';
 8	import NavbarGuest from '../components/NavbarGuest';
 9	import NavbarTenant from '../components/NavbarTenant';
 10	import NavbarLLPM from '../components/NavbarLLPM';
 11	// ---------------- Home Page ----------------
 12	const Home = () => {
 13	 const router = useRouter();
 14	 const [userRole, setUserRole] = useState(null);
 15	 const {
 16	 availabilityExternalIDs,
 17	 categoryExternalID,
 18	 locationExternalIDs,
 19	 minPrice,
 20	 maxPrice,
 21	 } = router.query;
 22	
 23	 // Get user role from localStorage
 24	 useEffect(() => {
 25	 try {
 26	 const raw = localStorage.getItem('user');
 27	 if (raw) {
 28	 const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
 29	 const roleFromUser = parsed?.role || parsed?.app_role || parsed?.user_role || parsed?.roleName;
 30	 if (roleFromUser) {
 31	 setUserRole(roleFromUser);
 32	 return;
 33	 }
 34	 }
 35	
 36	 // fallback to legacy `role` key
 37	 const role = localStorage.getItem('role');
 38	 setUserRole(role);
 39	 } catch (err) {
 40	 // if parsing fails, fallback to simple role key
 41	 const role = localStorage.getItem('role');
 42	 setUserRole(role);
 43	 }
 44	 }, []);
 45	
 46	 // Filter logic -----------------------------------------
 47	 const filteredProperties = mockProperties.filter((p) => {
 48	 if (availabilityExternalIDs && availabilityExternalIDs !== '' && p.availabilityExternalIDs !== availabilityExternalIDs) return false;
 49	 if (categoryExternalID && categoryExternalID !== '' && p.categoryExternalID !== categoryExternalID) return false;
 50	 if (locationExternalIDs && locationExternalIDs !== '' && p.locationExternalIDs !== locationExternalIDs) return false;
 51	
 52	 const min = minPrice ? Number(minPrice) : null;
 53	 const max = maxPrice ? Number(maxPrice) : null;
 54	
 55	 if (min !== null && p.price < min) return false;
 56	 if (max !== null && p.price > max) return false;
 57	 return true;
 58	 });
 59	
 60	 // Render navbar based on user role
 61	 const renderNavbar = () => {
 62	 if (userRole === 'LANDLORD' || userRole === 'PROPERTY_MANAGER') {
 63	 return <NavbarLLPM />;
 64	 } else if (userRole === 'TENANT') {
 65	 return <NavbarTenant />;
 66	 } else {
 67	 return <NavbarGuest />;
 68	 }
 69	 };
 70	
 71	 return (
 72	 <Box>
 73	 {renderNavbar()}
 74	
 75	 {/* ================= Hero Section ================= */}
 76	 <Box
 77	 width="100vw"
 78	 height={{ base: "420px", md: "520px" }}
 79	 position="relative"
 80	 left="50%"
 81	 right="50%"
 82	 ml="-50vw"
 83	 mr="-50vw"
 84	 overflow="hidden"
 85	 >
 86	 {/* Background Image */}
 87	 <Image
 88	 src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1555109307-f7d9da25c244?fm=jpg&q=60&w=3000&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxzZWFyY2h8M3x8ZW1waXJlJTIwc3RhdGUlMjBidWlsZGluZ3xlbnwwfHwwfHx8MA%3D%3D"
 89	 alt="Luxury Property Header"
 90	 layout="fill"
 91	 style={{ objectFit: "cover" }}
 92	 priority
 93	 />
 94	
 95	 {/* Overlay for readability */}
 96	 <Box
 97	 position="absolute"
 98	 inset="0"
 99	 bg="rgba(0,0,0,0.42)"
 100	 />
 101	
 102	 {/* Centered Hero Content */}
 103	 <SlideFade in offsetY={30}>
 104	 <Box
 105	 position="absolute"
 106	 top="42%"
 107	 left="50%"
 108	 transform="translate(-50%, -50%)"
 109	 textAlign="center"
 110	 color="white"
 111	 px={6}
 112	 >
 113	 <Text fontSize={{ base: "32px", md: "52px" }} fontWeight="bold">
 114	 Find Your Perfect Home
 115	 </Text>
 116	 <Text fontSize={{ base: "16px", md: "20px" }} opacity={0.9} mt={2}>
 117	 Discover premium properties tailored to your lifestyle
 118	 </Text>
 119	 </Box>
 120	 </SlideFade>
 121	
 122	 {/* Search Bar */}
 123	 <Box
 124	 position="absolute"
 125	 bottom="50px"
 126	 left="50%"
 127	 transform="translateX(-50%)"
 128	 width={{ base: "100%", md: "49%" }}
 129	 >
 130	 <SearchFilters />
 131	 </Box>
 132	 </Box>
 133	
 134	 {/* ================= Property List ================= */}
 135	 <Box
 136	 maxW="1400px"
 137	 mx="auto"
 138	 px={{ base: 4, md: 10 }}
 139	 mt="90px"
 140	 >
 141	
 142	 <Box textAlign="center" mb="45px">
 143	 <Text
 144	 fontSize={{ base: "28px", md: "38px" }}
 145	 fontWeight="700"
 146	 letterSpacing="-0.5px"
 147	 >
 148	 Featured Properties
 149	 </Text>
 150	 <Box
 151	 w="70px"
 152	 h="4px"
 153	 bg="teal.400"
 154	 mx="auto"
 155	 mt="10px"
 156	 borderRadius="full"
 157	 />
 158	 <Text color="gray.600" mt="10px" fontSize="17px">
 159	 Hand-picked listings curated for quality & lifestyle
 160	 </Text>
 161	 </Box>
 162	
 163	 {/* New Responsive Grid Layout for Cards */}
 164	 <Flex
 165	 wrap="wrap"
 166	 gap="30px"
 167	 justify="center"
 168	 align="stretch"
 169	 >
 170	 {filteredProperties.map((property) => (
 171	 <Property property={property} key={property.id} />
 172	 ))}
 173	 </Flex>
 174	
 175	 {/* If No Result */}
 176	 {filteredProperties.length === 0 && (
 177	 <Box mt="10" fontSize="24px" textAlign="center" color="gray.500">
 178	 No properties found.
 179	 </Box>
 180	 )}
 181	 </Box>
 182	
 183	
 184	 {/* ================= CTA Section ================= */}
 185	 {!userRole && (
 186	 <Box textAlign="center" py="70px" mt="20" bg="gray.50">
 187	 <Text fontSize="32px" fontWeight="bold" mb={3}>
 188	 Ready To Move Into Your Dream House?
 189	 </Text>
 190	 <Text fontSize="18px" color="gray.600" mb={6}>
 191	 Browse thousands of listings updated daily.
 192	 </Text>
 193	 <Button size="lg" colorScheme="teal" onClick={() => router.push('/signup')}>
 194	 Get Started
 195	 </Button>
 196	 </Box>
 197	 )}
 198	 </Box>
 199	 );
 200	};
 201	
 202	export default Home;

 1	import Head from 'next/head';
 2	import { Box } from '@chakra-ui/react';
 3	import { useRouter } from 'next/router';
 4	import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
 5	
 6	import Footer from './Footer';
 7	import Navbar from './NavbarLLPM';
 8	import NavbarTenant from './NavbarTenant';
 9	import NavbarGuest from './NavbarGuest';
 10	
 11	export default function Layout({ children }) {
 12	 const router = useRouter();
 13	 const [userRole, setUserRole] = useState(null);
 14	
 15	 // pages you do NOT want navbar on
 16	 const hideNavbarRoutes = [
 17	 '/login',
 18	 '/register',
 19	 '/messages',
 20	 '/forgot-password'
 21	 ];
 22	
 23	 const shouldShowNavbar = !hideNavbarRoutes.includes(router.pathname);
 24	
 25	 // Get user role from localStorage on mount
 26	 useEffect(() => {
 27	 const role = localStorage.getItem('role');
 28	 setUserRole(role);
 29	 }, []);
 30	
 31	 // Render appropriate navbar based on role
 32	 const renderNavbar = () => {
 33	 if (!shouldShowNavbar) return null;
 34	
 35	 // TEMPORARY: Force NavbarLLPM for testing on landlord routes
 36	 if (router.pathname.startsWith('/landlord')) {
 37	 return <Navbar />;
 38	 }
 39	
 40	 switch (userRole) {
 41	 case 'LANDLORD':
 42	 case 'PROPERTY_MANAGER':
 43	 return <Navbar />;
 44	 case 'TENANT':
 45	 return <NavbarTenant />;
 46	 default:
 47	 return <NavbarGuest />;
 48	 }
 49	 };
 50	
 51	 return (
 52	 <>
 53	 <Head>
 54	 <title>Real Estate</title>
 55	 </Head>
 56	
 57	 <Box maxWidth='1280px' m='auto'>
 58	 <header>
 59	 {renderNavbar()}
 60	 </header>
 61	
 62	 <main>{children}</main>
 63	
 64	 <footer>
 65	 <Footer />
 66	 </footer>
 67	 </Box>
 68	 </>
 69	 );
 70	}

 2	import { IconButton, Flex, Box, Spacer, HStack } from '@chakra-ui/react';
 3	import { useRouter } from 'next/router';
 4	import { FaUserCircle } from 'react-icons/fa';
 5	import NotificationDropdown from './NotificationDropdown';
 6	
 7	const NavbarLLPM = () => {
 8	 const router = useRouter();
 9	 const { pathname } = router;
 10	 // Determine user role from localStorage (fallback to LANDLORD)
 11	 let userRole = 'LANDLORD';
 12	 let userId = null;
 13	 if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
 14	 const stored = window.localStorage.getItem('role');
 15	 if (stored) userRole = stored;
 16	 userId = window.localStorage.getItem('userId');
 17	 }
 18	 
 19	 const baseTabs = ["Properties", "Documents", "Messages", "Payments", "Requests"];
 20	 const tabs = userRole === 'PROPERTY_MANAGER' ? baseTabs : ["Employees", ...baseTabs];
 21	 
 22	 // Map tab names to their actual routes
 23	 const pathMap = {
 24	 'Documents': '/property/select?returnTo=documents',
 25	 };
 26	
 27	 const getTabPath = (label) => {
 28	 return pathMap[label] || `/${label.toLowerCase()}`;
 29	 };
 30	
 31	 return (
 32	 <Flex
 33	 px="6"
 34	 py="3"
 35	 align="center"
 36	 borderBottom="1px solid"
 37	 borderColor="gray.200"
 38	 bg="white"
 39	 position="sticky"
 40	 top="0"
 41	 zIndex="1000"
 42	 >
 43	 {/* Logo */}
 44	 <Box fontSize="2xl" fontWeight="bold" color="blue.500">
 45	 <Link href="/">RentMate</Link>
 46	 </Box>
 47	 
 48	 <Spacer />
 49	 
 50	 {/* Center Menu Items */}
 51	 <HStack spacing="8" fontSize="lg" fontWeight="medium">
 52	 {tabs.map((label) => (
 53	 <Link href={getTabPath(label)} key={label} passHref>
 54	 <Box
 55	 position="relative"
 56	 pb="1"
 57	 cursor="pointer"
 58	 _before={{
 59	 content: '""',
 60	 position: "absolute",
 61	 width: "0%",
 62	 height: "2px",
 63	 bottom: "0",
 64	 left: "0",
 65	 bg: "blue.500",
 66	 transition: "width 0.25s ease-in-out",
 67	 }}
 68	 _hover={{
 69	 color: "blue.600",
 70	 _before: { width: "100%" },
 71	 }}
 72	 transition="color 0.2s ease"
 73	 >
 74	 {label}
 75	 </Box>
 76	 </Link>
 77	 ))}
 78	 </HStack>
 79	 
 80	 <Spacer />
 81	 
 82	 {/* Right Side */}
 83	 <HStack spacing="4">
 84	 <NotificationDropdown />
 85	 <IconButton
 86	 aria-label="profile"
 87	 icon={<FaUserCircle size={28} />}
 88	 variant="ghost"
 89	 onClick={() => router.push(`/profile/${userId}`)}
 90	 cursor="pointer"
 91	 />
 92	 </HStack>
 93	 </Flex>
 94	 );
 95	};
 96	 
 97	export default NavbarLLPM;

 6	export default function LoginPage() {
 7	
 8	 const router = useRouter();
 9	 const toast = useToast();
 10	
 11	 const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
 12	 const [password, setPassword] = useState('');

 14	
 15	 return (
 16	 <Flex h="100vh" w="100%" >
 17	 {/* LEFT IMAGE */}

 20	 src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1582407947304-fd86f028f716?fm=jpg&q=60&w=3000&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxzZWFyY2h8Mnx8cmVhbCUyMGVzdGF0ZXxlbnwwfHwwfHx8MA%3D%3D"
 21	 alt="login"
 22	 h="100%"
 23	 w="100%"
 24	 objectFit="cover"
 25	 />
 26	 </Box>
 27	
 28	 {/* RIGHT SIDE LOGIN */}
 29	 <Flex w={{ base: "100%", md: "50%" }} align="center" justify="center">
 30	 <Box w={{ base: "80%", md: "350px" }} textAlign="center">
 31	 <Text fontSize="4xl" fontWeight="medium" color="gray.800">
 32	 Sign in
 33	 </Text>
 34	 <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" mt={3}>
 35	 Welcome back! Please sign in to continue
 36	 </Text>
 37	
 38	 <Button w="100%" mt={8} bg="gray.100" h="50px" borderRadius="full">
 39	 <Image src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/prebuiltui/prebuiltui/main/assets/login/googleLogo.svg" />
 40	 </Button>
 41	
 42	 <Flex align="center" gap={3} w="100%" my={5}>
 43	 <Box flex="1" h="1px" bg="gray.300" />
 44	 <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" whiteSpace="nowrap">
 45	 or sign in with email
 46	 </Text>
 47	 <Box flex="1" h="1px" bg="gray.300" />
 48	 </Flex>
 49	
 50	 <Flex
 51	 align="center"
 52	 w="100%"
 53	 border="1px solid"
 54	 borderColor="gray.300"
 55	 h="50px"
 56	 borderRadius="full"
 57	 pl={4}
 58	 gap={2}
 59	 >
 60	 <Input
 61	 placeholder="Email"
 62	 border="none"
 63	 _focus={{ boxShadow: "none" }}
 64	 value={email}
 65	 onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
 66	 />
 67	 </Flex>
 68	
 69	 <Flex
 70	 align="center"
 71	 mt={5}
 72	 w="100%"
 73	 border="1px solid"
 74	 borderColor="gray.300"
 75	 h="50px"
 76	 borderRadius="full"
 77	 pl={4}
 78	 gap={2}
 79	 >
 80	 <Input
 81	 type="password"
 82	 placeholder="Password"
 83	 border="none"
 84	 _focus={{ boxShadow: "none" }}
 85	 value={password}
 86	 onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
 87	 />
 88	 </Flex>
 89	
 90	 <Flex w="100%" justify="space-between" mt={6} color="gray.600" fontSize="sm">
 91	 <Checkbox>Remember me</Checkbox>
 92	 <Text as="a" textDecoration="underline" cursor="pointer" onClick={() => router.push("/forgot-password")}>
 93	 Forgot password?
 94	 </Text>
 95	 </Flex>
 96	
 97	 <Button
 98	 w="100%"
 99	 h="44px"
 100	 mt={8}
 101	 borderRadius="full"
 102	 color="white"
 103	 bg="blue.500"
 104	 _hover={{ opacity: 0.9 }}
 105	 isLoading={loading}
 106	 onClick={async () => {
 107	 setLoading(true);
 108	 try {
 109	 const payload = { email: email.trim(), password };
 110	 const res = await apiPost('/auth/login', payload);
 111	
 112	 console.debug('Auth response:', res);
 113	
 114	 const pick = (obj, keys) => {
 115	 if (!obj) return null;
 116	 for (const k of keys) {
 117	 if (obj[k] !== undefined && obj[k] !== null) return obj[k];
 118	 }
 119	 return null;
 120	 };
 121	
 122	 // Try common token/user field names
 123	 let token = pick(res, ['token', 'accessToken', 'access_token', 'access', 'jwt', 'authToken']);
 124	 let user = pick(res, ['user', 'userInfo', 'profile']);
 125	
 126	 // Try nested data
 127	 if (!token && res && typeof res === 'object') {
 128	 token = pick(res.data, ['token', 'accessToken', 'access_token', 'access']) || (res.data && res.data.tokens && res.data.tokens.access) || token;
 129	 }
 130	 if (!user && res && typeof res === 'object') {
 131	 user = pick(res.data, ['user', 'userInfo', 'profile']) || user;
 132	 }
 133	
 134	 // Some APIs return { data: { accessToken, user } }
 135	 if (!token && res && res.data && typeof res.data === 'object') {
 136	 token = pick(res.data, ['accessToken', 'token', 'access_token']);
 137	 }
 138	
 139	 if (!user && res && res.data && typeof res.data === 'object') {
 140	 user = res.data.user || res.data;
 141	 }
 142	
 143	 if (!token || !user) {
 144	 const debugStr = JSON.stringify(res, Object.keys(res || {}).slice(0, 20), 2);
 145	 console.error('Unable to extract auth token/user from response', res);
 146	 throw new Error('Invalid response from auth server — unexpected response shape: ' + (debugStr ? debugStr.slice(0, 400) : 'empty'));
 147	 }
 148	
 149	 if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
 150	 localStorage.setItem('accessToken', token);
 151	 localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(user));
 152	 if (user && user.id) localStorage.setItem('userId', String(user.id));
 153	 }
 154	
 155	 toast({ title: 'Signed in', description: 'Redirecting...', status: 'success', duration: 2000 });
 156	 router.push('/');
 157	 } catch (err) {
 158	 console.error('Login error', err);
 159	 const msg = err?.message || 'Login failed';
 160	 // Show a longer duration so user can read debug info if present
 161	 toast({ title: 'Login failed', description: msg, status: 'error', duration: 8000, isClosable: true });
 162	 } finally {
 163	 setLoading(false);
 164	 }
 165	 }}
 166	 >
 167	 Login
 168	 </Button>
 169	
 170	 <Text mt={4} fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
 171	 Don’t have an account?{" "}
 172	 <Text as="a" color="blue.400" cursor="pointer" _hover={{ textDecoration: "underline" }} onClick={() => router.push("/signup")} >
 173	 Sign up
 174	 </Text>
 175	 </Text>
 176	 </Box>
 177	 </Flex>
 178	 </Flex>
 179	 );
 180	}

 1	import { useState } from 'react';
 2	import { Flex, Select, Box, Input, Button, HStack } from '@chakra-ui/react';
 3	import { useRouter } from 'next/router';
 4	import { filterData } from '../utils/filterData';
 5	import { BsSearch } from 'react-icons/bs';
 6	
 7	export default function SearchFilters() {
 8	 const [filters] = useState(filterData);
 9	 const [searchText, setSearchText] = useState("");
 10	 const router = useRouter();
 11	
 12	 const searchProperties = (filterValues) => {
 13	 const path = router.pathname;
 14	 const { query } = router;
 15	
 16	 const newQuery = { ...query, ...filterValues };
 17	 Object.keys(newQuery).forEach((key) => !newQuery[key] && delete newQuery[key]);
 18	
 19	 router.push({ pathname: path, query: newQuery });
 20	 };
 21	
 22	 const handleTextSearch = () => {
 23	 if (searchText.trim()) searchProperties({ search: searchText });
 24	 };
 25	
 26	 return (
 27	 <Flex
 28	 bg="white"
 29	 p="5"
 30	 borderRadius="12px"
 31	 flexWrap="wrap"
 32	 justifyContent="center"
 33	 boxShadow="0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)"
 34	 border="1px solid #e5e7eb"
 35	 gap="15px"
 36	 >
 37	
 38	 {/* ⬆ All dropdowns stay horizontal */}
 39	 <Flex gap="10px" wrap="wrap" justify="center">
 40	 {filters?.map((filter) => (
 41	 <Box key={filter.queryName}>
 42	 <Select
 43	 onChange={(e) => searchProperties({ [filter.queryName]: e.target.value })}
 44	 placeholder={filter.placeholder}
 45	 w="170px"
 46	 bg="white"
 47	 borderRadius="8px"
 48	 border="1px solid #cbd5e0"
 49	 _hover={{ borderColor: "blue.400" }}
 50	 _focus={{ borderColor: "blue.500", boxShadow: "0 0 0 1px #3182ce" }}
 51	 >
 52	 {filter?.items?.map((item) => (
 53	 <option value={item.value} key={item.value}>
 54	 {item.name}
 55	 </option>
 56	 ))}
 57	 </Select>
 58	 </Box>
 59	 ))}
 60	 </Flex>
 61	
 62	 {/* ⬇ Search input + button on NEW ROW + centered */}
 63	 <HStack spacing={2} justify="center" width="100%">
 64	 <Button
 65	 leftIcon={<BsSearch />}
 66	 bg="white"
 67	 color="black"
 68	 border="1px solid #cbd5e0"
 69	 _hover={{ bg:"#f7f7f7" }}
 70	 borderRadius="8px"
 71	 onClick={handleTextSearch}
 72	 >
 73	 Search
 74	 </Button>
 75	 </HStack>
 76	 </Flex>
 77	 );
 78	}

 1	// utils/apiClient.js
 2	const API_BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:8081/api";
 3	
 4	const buildHeaders = () => {
 5	 const headers = { "Content-Type": "application/json" };
 6	 if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
 7	 const token = localStorage.getItem("accessToken");
 8	 if (token) headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
 9	 }
 10	 return headers;
 11	};
 12	
 13	export async function apiGet(endpoint) {
 14	 const url = `${API_BASE}${endpoint}`;
 15	 const res = await fetch(url, {
 16	 method: "GET",
 17	 headers: buildHeaders(),
 18	 });
 19	
 20	 if (!res.ok) {
 21	 throw new Error(`API Error: ${res.status} ${res.statusText}`);
 22	 }
 23	
 24	 return res.json();
 25	}
 26	
 27	export async function apiPut(endpoint, body) {
 28	 const url = `${API_BASE}${endpoint}`;
 29	 const res = await fetch(url, {
 30	 method: "PUT",
 31	 headers: buildHeaders(),
 32	 body: JSON.stringify(body),
 33	 });
 34	
 35	 if (!res.ok) {
 36	 throw new Error(`API Error: ${res.status} ${res.statusText}`);
 37	 }
 38	
 39	 return res.json();
 40	}
 41	
 42	export async function apiPost(endpoint, body) {
 43	 const url = `${API_BASE}${endpoint}`;
 44	 const res = await fetch(url, {
 45	 method: "POST",
 46	 headers: buildHeaders(),
 47	 body: JSON.stringify(body),
 48	 });
 49	
 50	 if (!res.ok) {
 51	 throw new Error(`API Error: ${res.status} ${res.statusText}`);
 52	 }
 53	
 54	 return res.json();
 55	}
 56	
 57	export async function apiDelete(endpoint) {
 58	 const url = `${API_BASE}${endpoint}`;
 59	 const res = await fetch(url, {
 60	 method: "DELETE",
 61	 headers: buildHeaders(),
 62	 });
 63	
 64	 if (!res.ok) {
 65	 throw new Error(`API Error: ${res.status} ${res.statusText}`);
 66	 }
 67	
 68	 return res.json();
 69	}

IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "file_content": "# RentMate Frontend - Comprehensive Refactoring Plan\n\n## Executive Summary\n\nYour RentMate frontend has significant organizational and architectural issues that need addressing. This document provides a complete refactoring strategy to modernize the codebase, improve maintainability, and enhance the user experience.\n\n---\n\n## Part 1: Critique of Current Codebase\n\n### Critical Issues Identified\n\n#### 1. **Chaotic File Structure**\n- **Problem**: Files scattered across `/pages`, `/components`, `/utils`, `/src` with no clear separation of concerns\n- **Impact**: Difficult to locate files, inconsistent naming conventions, mixed responsibilities\n- **Examples**:\n - Components in `/components` (old style) AND `/src/components`\n - Pages in `/pages` (Pages Router) but also `/src/app` (App Router) - MIXED routing approaches\n - Utils in `/utils` AND potentially in `/src/services`\n\n#### 2. **Mixed Next.js Routing Approaches**\n- **Problem**: Project uses BOTH Pages Router (`/pages`) AND App Router (`/src/app`)\n- **Impact**: Confusion, duplicate code, maintenance nightmare\n- **Recommendation**: Migrate entirely to App Router (modern Next.js standard)\n\n#### 3. **No State Management**\n- **Problem**: User role/auth state scattered across localStorage with manual parsing in every component\n- **Impact**: \n - Code duplication (see `pages/index.js` lines 24-44)\n - Inconsistent role key names (`role`, `app_role`, `user_role`, `roleName`)\n - No centralized auth state\n- **Example**: NavbarGuest, NavbarTenant, NavbarLLPM all re-implement role detection\n\n#### 4. **Component Design Issues**\n- **Problem**: Components are too large and handle too much logic\n- **Examples**:\n - `pages/index.js` (203 lines): Mixes hero section, search, filtering, navbar selection, and property listing\n - `pages/login.js` (181 lines): Complex auth logic mixed with UI\n - `pages/maintenance/submit.js` (182 lines): All form logic in one component\n- **Impact**: Hard to test, reuse, and maintain\n\n#### 5. **Props Drilling & Repeated Code**\n- **Problem**: Same navbar logic repeated 3 times (NavbarGuest, NavbarTenant, NavbarLLPM)\n- **Impact**: Bug fixes need to be applied in multiple places\n- **Example**: Logout logic duplicated in NavbarTenant\n\n#### 6. **No Centralized API Client**\n- **Problem**: While `utils/apiClient.js` exists, it's not used consistently\n- **Impact**: Some pages use fetch directly, others use apiClient\n- **Example**: `pages/properties.js` line 34 uses fetch directly instead of apiClient\n\n#### 7. **Outdated Dependencies**\n- **Problem**: \n - Next.js 11.1.2 (released 2021, current is 14+)\n - React 17.0.2 (current is 18+)\n - Chakra UI 1.6.8 (current is 2.8+)\n- **Impact**: Missing modern features, security vulnerabilities, performance issues\n\n#### 8. **No TypeScript**\n- **Problem**: Project uses .js/.jsx without TypeScript\n- **Impact**: No type safety, harder to catch bugs, poor IDE support\n\n#### 9. **Inconsistent UI/UX**\n- **Problem**: \n - Hardcoded colors and spacing throughout\n - No design system or theme\n - Inconsistent button styles, form inputs, card designs\n- **Impact**: Unprofessional appearance, maintenance nightmare\n\n#### 10. **No Error Handling Strategy**\n- **Problem**: Error handling is ad-hoc (some use try-catch, some don't)\n- **Impact**: Poor user experience, silent failures\n\n---\n\n## Part 2: Proposed Refactoring Plan\n\n### Phase 1: Foundation (Week 1-2)\n1. Upgrade dependencies\n2. Set up TypeScript\n3. Create design system with Shadcn/ui\n4. Implement state management (Zustand)\n5. Create centralized auth context\n\n### Phase 2: Architecture (Week 2-3)\n1. Migrate from Pages Router to App Router\n2. Restructure folder organization\n3. Create reusable component library\n4. Implement error handling strategy\n\n### Phase 3: Components (Week 3-4)\n1. Refactor large components\n2. Extract business logic to hooks\n3. Create feature-specific modules\n4. Implement proper prop types\n\n### Phase 4: Polish (Week 4-5)\n1. Add comprehensive error boundaries\n2. Implement loading states\n3. Add accessibility features\n4. Performance optimization\n\n---\n\n## Part 3: New File Structure\n\nSee REFACTORING_PLAN_STRUCTURE.md for detailed folder tree and explanations.\n\n---\n\n## Part 4: Component Refactoring Examples\n\nSee REFACTORING_PLAN_COMPONENTS.md for before/after code examples.\n\n---\n\n## Part 5: State Management & Auth\n\nSee REFACTORING_PLAN_STATE.md for state management implementation.\n\n---\n\n## Part 6: UI/UX Overhaul\n\nSee REFACTORING_PLAN_UI.md for UI library recommendations and examples.\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Timeline\n\n- **Week 1**: Setup & Dependencies\n- **Week 2**: Architecture & State Management\n- **Week 3**: Component Refactoring\n- **Week 4**: Testing & Polish\n- **Week 5**: Deployment & Documentation\n\n---\n\n## Next Steps\n\n1. Review this plan with your team\n2. Start with Phase 1 (dependencies & TypeScript)\n3. Follow the detailed guides in the supporting documents\n4. Next.js App Router\n│ ├── (auth)/ # Auth layout group\n│ │ ├── login/\n│ │ │ └── page.tsx\n│ │ ├── signup/\n│ │ │ └── page.tsx\n│ │ ├── forgot-password/\n│ │ │ └── page.tsx\n│ │ └── layout.tsx # Auth layout (no navbar)\n│ │\n│ ├── (dashboard)/ # Root layout\n│ ├── page.tsx # Landing page\n│ └── error.tsx # Global error boundary\n│\n├── src/\n│ ├── components/ # Reusable UI components\n│ │ ├── common/ # Shared across app\n│ │ │ ├── Navbar/\n│ │ │ │ ├── Navbar.tsx\n│ │ │ │ ├── NavbarContent.tsx\n│ │ │ │ └── useNavbarItems.ts\n│ │ │ ├── Footer/\n│ │ │ ├── Button/\n│ │ │ ├── Card/\n│ │ │ ├── Modal/\n│ │ │ └── LoadingSpinner/\n│ │ │\n│ │ ├── auth/ # Auth-specific components\n│ │ │ ├── LoginForm.tsx\n│ │ │ ├── SignupForm.tsx\n│ │ │ └── ForgotPasswordForm.tsx\n│ │ │\n│ │ ├── property/ # Property-related components\n│ │ │ ├── PropertyCard.tsx\n│ │ │ ├── PropertyGrid.tsx\n│ │ │ ├── SearchFilters.tsx\n│ │ │ └── PropertyDetails.tsx\n│ │ │\n│ │ ├── maintenance/ # Maintenance-specific\n│ │ │ ├── MaintenanceForm.tsx\n│ │ │ ├── MaintenanceList.tsx\n│ │ │ └── MaintenanceCard.tsx\n│ │ │\n│ │ └── dashboard/ # Dashboard components\n│ │ ├── DashboardHeader.tsx\n│ │ └── DashboardSidebar.tsx\n│ │\n│ ├── hooks/ # Custom React hooks\n│ │ ├── useAuth.ts # Auth state & logic\n│ │ ├── useUser.ts # User data\n│ │ ├── useProperties.ts # Property fetching\n│ │ ├── useForm.ts # Form handling\n│ │ └── useApi.ts # API calls with loading/error\n│ │\n│ ├── store/ # State management (Zustand)\n│ │ ├── authStore.ts # Auth state\n│ │ ├── userStore.ts # User profile state\n│ │ ├── propertyStore.ts # Property listings state\n│ │ └── uiStore.ts # UI state (modals, notifications)\n│ │\n│ ├── services/ # Business logic & API\n│ │ ├── api/\n│ │ │ ├── client.ts # Axios instance\n│ │ │ ├── auth.ts # Auth endpoints\n│ │ │ ├── properties.ts # Property endpoints\n│ │ │ ├── maintenance.ts # Maintenance endpoints\n│ │ │ ├── messages.ts # Messaging endpoints\n│ │ │ └── payments.ts # Payment endpoints\n│ │ │\n│ │ └── utils/\n│ │ ├── validators.ts # Form validation\n│ │ ├── formatters.ts # Data formatting\n│ │ └── helpers.ts # Utility functions\n│ │\n│ ├── types/ # TypeScript types\n│ │ ├── auth.ts\n│ │ ├── property.ts\n│ │ ├── maintenance.ts\n│ │ ├── user.ts\n│ │ ├── api.ts\n│ │ └── index.ts\n│ │\n│ ├── lib/ # Third-party integrations\n│ │ ├── axios.ts # Axios config\n│ │ ├── toast.ts # Toast notifications\n│ │ └── theme.ts # Shadcn/ui theme\n│ │\n│ ├── constants/ # App constants\n│ │ ├── routes.ts\n│ │ ├── api.ts\n│ │ ├── roles.ts\n│ │ └── messages.ts\n│ │\n│ └── middleware.ts # Next.js middleware for auth\n│\n├── public/ # Static assets\n│ ├── images/\n│ ├── icons/\n│ └── fonts/\n│\n├── .env.local # Environment variables\n├── tsconfig.json # TypeScript config\n├── next.config.js # Next.js config\n├── tailwind.config.ts # Tailwind config\n└── package.json\n```\n\n## Key Improvements\n\n### 1. **Layout Groups** `(auth)` and `(dashboard)`\n- Separate layouts for authenticated vs public pages\n- No navbar on auth pages automatically\n- Cleaner routing structure\n\n### 2. **Feature-Based Organization**\n- Components grouped by feature (property, maintenance, auth)\n- Easy to find related code\n- Scales well as app grows\n\n### 3. **Centralized State Management**\n- `/src/store/` for Zustand stores\n- Single source of truth for auth, user, properties\n\n### 4. **Type Safety**\n- `/src/types/` for all TypeScript definitions\n- Shared across components and services\n\n### 5. **Service Layer**\n- `/src/services/api/` for all API calls\n- `/src/services/utils/` for business logic\n- Separates concerns from UI\n\n### 6. **Custom Hooks**\n- `/src/hooks/` for reusable logic\n- `useAuth()`, `useProperties()`, etc.\n- Keeps components clean and focused\n\n"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":3,"type":2,"content":""},{"id":4,"type":3,"content":""}],"seen_state":"unseen","structured_request_nodes":[{"id":1,"type":1,"tool_result_node":{"content":"File saved. IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "file_content": "# Component Refactoring Examples\n\n## Example 1: Navbar Refactoring\n\n### ❌ BEFORE: Three Separate Components (Duplicated Logic)\n\n```jsx\n// components/NavbarGuest.jsx (36 lines)\n// components/NavbarTenant.jsx (158 lines)\n// components/NavbarLLPM.jsx (97 lines)\n// Total: 291 lines of duplicated code!\n\n// Each has its own logout logic, icon handling, etc.\n```\n\n### ✅ AFTER: Single Unified Component\n\n```tsx\n// src/components/common/Navbar/Navbar.tsx\nimport { useAuth } from '@/hooks/useAuth';\nimport { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';\nimport { NavbarContent } from './NavbarContent';\n\nexport function Navbar() {\n const { user, logout } = useAuth();\n const router = useRouter();\n\n const handleLogout = async () => {\n await logout();\n router.push('/login');\n };\n\n return (\n <nav className=\"sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white border-b\">\n <div className=\"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between\">\n <Logo />\n <NavbarContent user={user} />\n <NavbarActions onLogout={handleLogout} />\n </div>\n </nav>\n );\n}\n\n// src/components/common/Navbar/NavbarContent.tsx\nexport function NavbarContent({ user }) {\n const navItems = useNavbarItems(user?.role);\n \n return (\n <div className=\"flex gap-8\">\n {navItems.map(item => (\n <NavLink key={item.id} href={item.href}>\n {item.label}\n </NavLink>\n ))}\n </div>\n );\n}\n\n// src/hooks/useNavbarItems.ts\nexport function useNavbarItems(role: UserRole) {\n const items = {\n GUEST: ['Properties', 'Search'],\n TENANT: ['Properties', 'Messages', 'Payments', 'Maintenance', 'Documents'],\n LANDLORD: ['Properties', 'Employees', 'Messages', 'Payments', 'Documents'],\n PROPERTY_MANAGER: ['Properties', 'Messages', 'Payments', 'Documents'],\n };\n \n return items[role] || items.GUEST;\n}\n```\n\n**Benefits:**\n- 291 lines → ~80 lines (72% reduction)\n- Single source of truth for navbar logic\n- Easy to add new nav items\n- Consistent behavior across roles\n\n---\n\n## Example 2: Login Page Refactoring\n\n### ❌ BEFORE: 181 Lines, Mixed Concerns\n\n```jsx\n// pages/login.js - All logic in one component\nexport default function LoginPage() {\n const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n \n // Complex token extraction logic (lines 114-147)\n const handleLogin = async () => {\n // ... 60 lines of complex logic\n };\n \n return (\n <Flex>\n {/* UI code mixed with logic */}\n </Flex>\n );\n}\n```\n\n### ✅ AFTER: Separated Concerns\n\n```tsx\n// src/components/auth/LoginForm.tsx\nimport { useLogin } from '@/hooks/useAuth';\nimport { Button } from '@/components/common/Button';\nimport { Input } from '@/components/common/Input';\n\nexport function LoginForm() {\n const { login, isLoading, error } = useLogin();\n const [formData, setFormData] = useForm({ email: '', password: '' });\n\n const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n e.preventDefault();\n await login(formData);\n };\n\n return (\n <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-4\">\n <Input\n label=\"Email\"\n type=\"email\"\n value={formData.email}\n onChange={(e) => setFormData('email', e.target.value)}\n error={error?.email}\n />\n <Input\n label=\"Password\"\n type=\"password\"\n value={formData.password}\n onChange={(e) => setFormData('password', e.target.value)}\n error={error?.password}\n />\n <Button type=\"submit\" isLoading={isLoading}>\n Sign In\n </Button>\n </form>\n );\n}\n\n// app/(auth)/login/page.tsx\nexport default function LoginPage() {\n return (\n <div className=\"flex h-screen\">\n <div className=\"hidden md:flex md:w-1/2\">\n <HeroImage />\n </div>\n <div className=\"w-full md:w-1/2 flex items-center justify-center\">\n <LoginForm />\n </div>\n </div>\n );\n}\n\n// src/hooks/useAuth.ts\nexport function useLogin() {\n const router = useRouter();\n const { setAuth } = useAuthStore();\n const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\n const [error, setError] = useState(null);\n\n const login = async (credentials: LoginCredentials) => {\n setIsLoading(true);\n setError(null);\n try {\n const response = await authService.login(credentials);\n setAuth(response.user, response.token);\n router.push('/');\n } catch (err) {\n setError(parseError(err));\n } finally {\n setIsLoading(false);\n }\n };\n\n return { login, isLoading, error };\n}\n```\n\n**Benefits:**\n- Clear separation: UI, logic, API calls\n- Reusable `useLogin` hook\n- Testable components\n- Error handling centralized\n- 181 lines → ~60 lines per file\n\n---\n\n## Example 3: Property Card Refactoring\n\n### ❌ BEFORE: 87 Lines, Hardcoded Styling\n\n```jsx\n// components/Property.jsx\nexport default function Property({ property }) {\n return (\n <Link href={`/property/${property.id}`}>\n <Box\n border=\"1px solid\"\n borderColor=\"gray.200\"\n rounded=\"lg\"\n width=\"400px\" // ← Hardcoded width\n m=\"3\"\n _hover={{ boxShadow: \"md\", transform: \"scale(1.02)\" }}\n >\n {/* ... */}\n </Box>\n </Link>\n );\n}\n```\n\n### ✅ AFTER: Reusable, Responsive, Typed\n\n```tsx\n// src/components/property/PropertyCard.tsx\nimport { Card } from '@/components/common/Card';\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/common/Badge';\nimport { Property } from '@/types/property';\nimport Link from 'next/link';\n\ninterface PropertyCardProps {\n property: Property;\n variant?: 'default' | 'compact';\n}\n\nexport function PropertyCard({ property, variant = 'default' }: PropertyCardProps) {\n const { title, price, coverPhoto, category, location, availability } = property;\n\n return (\n <Link href={`/properties/${property.id}`}>\n <Card className=\"hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow cursor-pointer\">\n <div className=\"relative\">\n <img\n src={coverPhoto?.url}\n alt={title}\n className=\"w-full h-48 object-cover rounded-t-lg\"\n />\n <Badge\n variant={availability === 'available' ? 'success' : 'warning'}\n className=\"absolute top-3 right-3\"\n >\n {availability}\n </Badge>\n </div>\n\n <div className=\"p-4\">\n <h3 className=\"font-bold text-lg mb-2\">{title}</h3>\n \n <div className=\"space-y-1 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-3\">\n <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n <MapPin size={16} />\n {location}\n </div>\n <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n <Tag size={16} />\n {category}\n </div>\n </div>\n\n <p className=\"text-xl font-bold text-blue-600\">\n ${price.toLocaleString()}\n </p>\n </div>\n </Card>\n </Link>\n );\n}\n```\n\n**Benefits:**\n- Responsive design (no hardcoded widths)\n- Reusable Badge, Card components\n- Type-safe with TypeScript\n- Variant support for different layouts\n- Easier to style with Tailwind\n\n---\n\n## Example 4: Form Handling Refactoring\n\n### ❌ BEFORE: Scattered State\n\n```jsx\n// pages/maintenance/submit.js\nconst [issueDate, setIssueDate] = useState(\"\");\nconst [preferredTime, setPreferredTime] = useState(\"\");\nconst [description, setDescription] = useState(\"\");\nconst [file, setFile] = useState(null);\nconst [priority, setPriority] = useState(\"Medium\");\n// 5 separate useState calls!\n```\n\n### ✅ AFTER: Custom Hook\n\n```tsx\n// src/hooks/useForm.ts\nexport function useForm<T extends Record<string, any>>(initialValues: T) {\n const [values, setValues] = useState(initialValues);\n const [errors, setErrors] = useState<Partial<T>>({});\n\n const handleChange = (field: keyof T, value: any) => {\n setValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: value }));\n // Clear error when user starts typing\n setErrors(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: undefined }));\n };\n\n const reset = () => setValues(initialValues);\n\n return { values, errors, setErrors, handleChange, reset };\n}\n\n// src/components/maintenance/MaintenanceForm.tsx\nexport function MaintenanceForm() {\n const { values, errors, handleChange } = useForm({\n issueDate: '',\n preferredTime: '',\n description: '',\n file: null,\n priority: 'Medium' as const,\n });\n\n const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n e.preventDefault();\n // Submit form\n };\n\n return (\n <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-6\">\n <Input\n label=\"Issue Date\"\n type=\"date\"\n value={values.issueDate}\n onChange={(e) => handleChange('issueDate', e.target.value)}\n error={errors.issueDate}\n />\n {/* ... other fields */}\n </form>\n );\n}\n```\n\n**Benefits:**\n- Reusable form logic\n- Automatic error clearing\n- Type-safe field handling\n- Easy to add validation\n- Reduced boilerplate\n\n"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":3,"type":2,"content":""},{"id":4,"type":3,"content":""}],"seen_state":"unseen","structured_request_nodes":[{"id":1,"type":1,"tool_result_node":{"content":"File IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BE CREATED.", "file_content": "# State Management & Authentication Refactoring\n\n## Problem: Current Approach\n\n```tsx\n// ❌ BEFORE: Scattered across localStorage with manual parsing\n// pages/index.js (lines 24-44)\nuseEffect(() => {\n try {\n const raw = localStorage.getItem('user');\n if (raw) {\n const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);\n const roleFromUser = parsed?.role || parsed?.app_role || parsed?.user_role || parsed?.roleName;\n if (roleFromUser) {\n setUserRole(roleFromUser);\n return;\n }\n }\n const role = localStorage.getItem('role');\n setUserRole(role);\n } catch (err) {\n const role = localStorage.getItem('role');\n setUserRole(role);\n }\n}, []);\n\n// This code is DUPLICATED in:\n// - components/Layout.jsx (lines 26-29)\n// - components/NavbarLLPM.jsx (lines 13-17)\n// - pages/index.js (lines 24-44)\n```\n\n## Solution: Zustand State Management\n\n### Why Zustand?\n- ✅ Lightweight (2.5KB)\n- ✅ No provider hell\n- ✅ TypeScript support\n- ✅ Middleware support\n- ✅ Persistent storage built-in\n- ✅ Easy to test\n\n---\n\n## Implementation\n\n### 1. Auth Store\n\n```tsx\n// src/store/authStore.ts\nimport { create } from 'zustand';\nimport { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';\nimport { User, UserRole } from '@/types/auth';\n\ninterface AuthState {\n user: User | null;\n token: string | null;\n isAuthenticated: boolean;\n isLoading: boolean;\n\n // Actions\n setAuth: (user: User, token: string) => void;\n logout: () => void;\n setLoading: (loading: boolean) => void;\n hydrate: () => void; // Initialize from localStorage\n}\n\nexport const useAuthStore = create<AuthState>()(\n persist(\n (set) => ({\n user: null,\n token: null,\n isAuthenticated: false,\n isLoading: false,\n\n setAuth: (user, token) =>\n set({\n user,\n token,\n isAuthenticated: true,\n }),\n\n logout: () =>\n set({\n user: null,\n token: null,\n isAuthenticated: false,\n }),\n\n setLoading: (isLoading) => set({ isLoading }),\n\n hydrate: () => {\n // Called on app startup to restore from localStorage\n const stored = localStorage.getItem('auth-storage');\n if (stored) {\n try {\n const { state } = JSON.parse(stored);\n set(state);\n } catch (err) {\n console.error('Failed to hydrate auth', err);\n }\n }\n },\n }),\n {\n name: 'auth-storage',\n partialize: (state) => ({\n user: state.user,\n token: state.token,\n isAuthenticated: state.isAuthenticated,\n }),\n }\n )\n);\n```\n\n### 2. User Store\n\n```tsx\n// src/store/userStore.ts\nimport { create } from 'zustand';\nimport { User } from '@/types/auth';\n\ninterface UserState {\n profile: User | null;\n isLoading: boolean;\n error: string | null;\n\n fetchProfile: (userId: string) => Promise<void>;\n updateProfile: (updates: Partial<User>) => Promise<void>;\n clearError: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const useUserStore = create<UserState>((set) => ({\n profile: null,\n isLoading: false,\n error: null,\n\n fetchProfile: async (userId) => {\n set({ isLoading: true, error: null });\n try {\n const response = await userService.getProfile(userId);\n set({ profile: response });\n } catch (error) {\n set({ error: error.message });\n } finally {\n set({ isLoading: false });\n }\n },\n\n updateProfile: async (updates) => {\n set({ isLoading: true, error: null });\n try {\n const response = await userService.updateProfile(updates);\n set({ profile: response });\n } catch (error) {\n set({ error: error.message });\n } finally {\n set({ isLoading: false });\n }\n },\n\n clearError: () => set({ error: null }),\n}));\n```\n\n### 3. Custom Hooks\n\n```tsx\n// src/hooks/useAuth.ts\nimport { useAuthStore } from '@/store/authStore';\nimport { authService } from '@/services/api/auth';\nimport { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';\n\nexport function useAuth() {\n const router = useRouter();\n const { user, token, isAuthenticated, setAuth, logout: storeLogout } = useAuthStore();\n\n const login = async (email: string, password: string) => {\n try {\n const response = await authService.login({ email, password });\n setAuth(response.user, response.token);\n router.push('/');\n } catch (error) {\n throw error;\n }\n };\n\n const logout = async () => {\n await authService.logout();\n storeLogout();\n router.push('/login');\n };\n\n const signup = async (data: SignupData) => {\n try {\n const response = await authService.signup(data);\n setAuth(response.user, response.token);\n router.push('/');\n } catch (error) {\n throw error;\n }\n };\n\n return {\n user,\n token,\n isAuthenticated,\n login,\n logout,\n signup,\n };\n}\n\n// src/hooks/useUserRole.ts\nexport function useUserRole() {\n const { user } = useAuthStore();\n return user?.role as UserRole;\n}\n\n// src/hooks/useIsAuthenticated.ts\nexport function useIsAuthenticated() {\n const { isAuthenticated } = useAuthStore();\n return isAuthenticated;\n}\n```\n\n### 4. Usage in Components\n\n```tsx\n// ✅ AFTER: Clean, simple component\n// src/components/common/Navbar/Navbar.tsx\nimport { useAuth } from '@/hooks/useAuth';\nimport { useUserRole } from '@/hooks/useUserRole';\n\nexport function Navbar() {\n const { logout } = useAuth();\n const role = useUserRole();\n\n return (\n <nav>\n {/* navbar content */}\n </nav>\n );\n}\n\n// src/app/layout.tsx\n'use client';\n\nimport { useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useAuthStore } from '@/store/authStore';\n\nexport default function RootLayout({ children }) {\n const hydrate = useAuthStore((state) => state.hydrate);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n hydrate(); // Restore auth state on app load\n }, [hydrate]);\n\n return (\n <html>\n <body>{children}</body>\n </html>\n );\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Benefits\n\n| Before | After |\n|--------|-------|\n| Role parsing in 3+ places | Single source of truth |\n| Inconsistent role key names | Standardized types |\n| Manual localStorage handling | Automatic persistence |\n| Props drilling | Direct store access |\n| No error handling | Built-in error state |\n| Hard to test | Easy to mock |\n\n---\n\n## Migration Checklist\n\n- [ ] Install zustand: `npm install zustand`\n- [ ] Create auth store\n- [ ] Create user store\n- [ ] Create custom hooks\n- [ ] Update components to use hooks\n- [ ] Remove localStorage calls from components\n- [ ] Add hydration to root layout\n- [ ] Test authentication flow\n- [ ] Test persistence across page reloads\n\n"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":3,"type":2,"content":""},{"id":4,"type":3,"content":""}],"seen_state":"unseen","structured_request_nodes":[{"id":1,"type":1,"tool_result_node":{"content":"File saved. IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "file_content": "# UI/UX Overhaul: Shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS\n\n## Recommendation: Shadcn/ui\n\n### Why Shadcn/ui?\n- ✅ Built on Radix UI (accessible components)\n- ✅ Styled with Tailwind CSS (customizable)\n- ✅ Copy-paste component library (no vendor lock-in)\n- ✅ Dark mode support\n- ✅ Excellent for dashboards\n- ✅ Modern, professional look\n- ✅ Active community\n\n### Comparison\n\n| Feature | Chakra UI | Material UI | Shadcn/ui |\n|---------|-----------|------------|-----------|\n| Bundle Size | Large | Large | Small |\n| Customization | Good | Good | Excellent |\n| Dark Mode | Yes | Yes | Yes |\n| Accessibility | Good | Excellent | Excellent |\n| Learning Curve | Low | Medium | Low |\n| Dashboard-Ready | No | Yes | Yes |\n| TypeScript | Yes | Yes | Yes |\n\n---\n\n## Migration Plan\n\n### Phase 1: Setup\n\n```bash\n# Install dependencies\nnpm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer\nnpm install -D @types/node\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest init\n\n# Choose options:\n# - TypeScript: Yes\n# - Style: Default\n# - Base color: Slate\n# - CSS variables: Yes\n```\n\n### Phase 2: Replace Chakra with Shadcn\n\n#### Before: Chakra UI\n\n```jsx\n// ❌ Chakra UI\nimport { Box, Button, Input, Flex, Text } from \"@chakra-ui/react\";\n\nexport function LoginForm() {\n return (\n <Flex direction=\"column\" gap={4}>\n <Text fontSize=\"2xl\" fontWeight=\"bold\">\n Sign In\n </Text>\n <Input placeholder=\"Email\" />\n <Input type=\"password\" placeholder=\"Password\" />\n <Button colorScheme=\"blue\" w=\"100%\">\n Login\n </Button>\n </Flex>\n );\n}\n```\n\n#### After: Shadcn/ui + Tailwind\n\n```tsx\n// ✅ Shadcn/ui + Tailwind\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\nimport { Card } from '@/components/ui/card';\n\nexport function LoginForm() {\n return (\n <Card className=\"w-full max-w-sm p-6\">\n <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold\">Sign In</h1>\n <Input placeholder=\"Email\" type=\"email\" />\n <Input placeholder=\"Password\" type=\"password\" />\n <Button className=\"w-full\">Login</Button>\n </div>\n </Card>\n );\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Component Examples\n\n### 1. Property Card\n\n```tsx\n// src/components/property/PropertyCard.tsx\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';\nimport { MapPin, DollarSign } from 'lucide-react';\n\nexport function PropertyCard({ property }) {\n return (\n <Card className=\"hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow cursor-pointer\">\n <div className=\"relative\">\n <img\n src={property.coverPhoto?.url}\n alt={property.title}\n className=\"w-full h-48 object-cover rounded-t-lg\"\n />\n <Badge\n variant={property.availability === 'available' ? 'default' : 'secondary'}\n className=\"absolute top-3 right-3\"\n >\n {property.availability}\n </Badge>\n </div>\n\n <CardContent className=\"pt-4\">\n <CardTitle className=\"text-lg\">{property.title}</CardTitle>\n <CardDescription className=\"mt-2 space-y-2\">\n <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm\">\n <MapPin className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n {property.location}\n </div>\n <div className=\"text-lg font-bold text-blue-600\">\n ${property.price.toLocaleString()}\n </div>\n </CardDescription>\n </CardContent>\n </Card>\n );\n}\n```\n\n### 2. Form with Validation\n\n```tsx\n// src/components/auth/LoginForm.tsx\nimport { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';\nimport { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod';\nimport { z } from 'zod';\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\nimport {\n Form,\n FormControl,\n FormField,\n FormItem,\n FormLabel,\n FormMessage,\n} from '@/components/ui/form';\n\nconst loginSchema = z.object({\n email: z.string().email('Invalid email'),\n password: z.string().min(6, 'Password too short'),\n});\n\ntype LoginFormData = z.infer<typeof loginSchema>;\n\nexport function LoginForm() {\n const form = useForm<LoginFormData>({\n resolver: zodResolver(loginSchema),\n });\n\n return (\n <Form {...form}>\n <form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className=\"space-y-4\">\n <FormField\n control={form.control}\n name=\"email\"\n render={({ field }) => (\n <FormItem>\n <FormLabel>Email</FormLabel>\n <FormControl>\n <Input placeholder=\"email@example.com\" {...field} />\n </FormControl>\n <FormMessage />\n </FormItem>\n )}\n />\n\n <FormField\n control={form.control}\n name=\"password\"\n render={({ field }) => (\n <FormItem>\n <FormLabel>Password</FormLabel>\n <FormControl>\n <Input type=\"password\" {...field} />\n </FormControl>\n <FormMessage />\n </FormItem>\n )}\n />\n\n <Button type=\"submit\" className=\"w-full\">\n Sign In\n </Button>\n </form>\n </Form>\n );\n}\n```\n\n### 3. Dashboard Layout\n\n```tsx\n// src/components/dashboard/DashboardLayout.tsx\nimport { Sidebar } from '@/components/common/Sidebar';\nimport { Navbar } from '@/components/common/Navbar';\n\nexport function DashboardLayout({ children }) {\n return (\n <div className=\"flex h-screen bg-gray-50\">\n <Sidebar />\n <div className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col\">\n <Navbar />\n <main className=\"flex-1 overflow-auto p-6\">\n {children}\n </main>\n </div>\n </div>\n );\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Design System Tokens\n\n```tsx\n// src/lib/theme.ts\nexport const theme = {\n colors: {\n primary: '#3B82F6', // Blue\n secondary: '#10B981', // Green\n danger: '#EF4444', // Red\n warning: '#F59E0B', // Amber\n success: '#10B981', // Green\n },\n spacing: {\n xs: '0.25rem',\n sm: '0.5rem',\n md: '1rem',\n lg: '1.5rem',\n xl: '2rem',\n },\n borderRadius: {\n sm: '0.375rem',\n md: '0.5rem',\n lg: '0.75rem',\n full: '9999px',\n },\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n## Installation Steps\n\n```bash\n# 1. Install Shadcn components as needed\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest add button\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest add input\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest add card\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest add form\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest add dialog\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest add dropdown-menu\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest add select\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest add tabs\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest add toast\n\n# 2. Install form validation\nnpm install react-hook-form zod @hookform/resolvers\n\n# 3. Install icons\nnpm install lucide-react\n```\n\n---\n\n## Migration Checklist\n\n- [ ] Install Tailwind CSS\n- [ ] Initialize Shadcn/ui\n- [ ] Install required components\n- [ ] Create design system tokens\n- [ ] Migrate auth pages\n- [ ] Migrate property listing pages\n- [ ] Migrate dashboard components\n- [ ] Update forms with validation\n- [ ] Test responsive design\n- [ ] Add dark mode support\n\n"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":3,"type":2,"content":""},{"id":4,"type":3,"content":""}],"seen_state":"unseen","structured_request_nodes":[{"id":1,"type":1,"tool_result_node":{"content":"File saved. IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "file_content": "# Implementation Guide: Step-by-Step\n\n## Phase 1: Foundation Setup (Days 1-3)\n\n### Step 1.1: Upgrade Dependencies\n\n```bash\n# Update Next.js and React\nnpm install next@latest react@latest react-dom@latest\n\n# Remove old Chakra UI\nnpm uninstall @chakra-ui/react @emotion/react @emotion/styled framer-motion\n\n# Install new dependencies\nnpm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer\nnpm install zustand zod react-hook-form @hookform/resolvers\nnpm install lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge\nnpm install -D @types/node typescript\n```\n\n### Step 1.2: Initialize TypeScript\n\n```bash\n# Create tsconfig.json\nnpx tsc --init\n\n# Rename .js files to .tsx/.ts\n# Update next.config.js to next.config.ts\n```\n\n### Step 1.3: Setup Tailwind CSS\n\n```bash\nnpx tailwindcss init -p\n```\n\nUpdate `tailwind.config.ts`:\n\n```ts\nimport type { Config } from 'tailwindcss'\n\nconst config: Config = {\n content: [\n './src/pages/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}',\n './src/components/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}',\n './src/app/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}',\n ],\n theme: {\n extend: {\n colors: {\n primary: '#3B82F6',\n secondary: '#10B981',\n },\n },\n },\n plugins: [],\n}\nexport default config\n```\n\n### Step 1.4: Initialize Shadcn/ui\n\n```bash\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest init\n# Choose: TypeScript, Default style, Slate color, CSS variables\n```\n\n---\n\n## Phase 2: Architecture Migration (Days 4-7)\n\n### Step 2.1: Create New Folder Structure\n\n```bash\n# Create src directory structure\nmkdir -p src/{components,hooks,store,services,types,lib,constants}\nmkdir -p src/components/{common,auth,property,maintenance,dashboard}\nmkdir -p src/services/api\nmkdir -p app/{auth,dashboard}\n```\n\n### Step 2.2: Create Type Definitions\n\n```tsx\n// src/types/auth.ts\nexport type UserRole = 'GUEST' | 'TENANT' | 'LANDLORD' | 'PROPERTY_MANAGER';\n\nexport interface User {\n id: string;\n email: string;\n name: string;\n role: UserRole;\n avatar?: string;\n}\n\nexport interface LoginCredentials {\n email: string;\n password: string;\n}\n\nexport interface SignupData extends LoginCredentials {\n name: string;\n phone: string;\n role: UserRole;\n}\n\n// src/types/property.ts\nexport interface Property {\n id: string;\n title: string;\n description: string;\n price: number;\n location: string;\n category: string;\n availability: 'available' | 'unavailable';\n coverPhoto?: { url: string };\n images?: Array<{ url: string }>;\n}\n\n// src/types/index.ts\nexport * from './auth';\nexport * from './property';\n```\n\n### Step 2.3: Create Zustand Stores\n\n```tsx\n// src/store/authStore.ts\nimport { create } from 'zustand';\nimport { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';\nimport { User } from '@/types/auth';\n\ninterface AuthState {\n user: User | null;\n token: string | null;\n isAuthenticated: boolean;\n setAuth: (user: User, token: string) => void;\n logout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const useAuthStore = create<AuthState>()(\n persist(\n (set) => ({\n user: null,\n token: null,\n isAuthenticated: false,\n setAuth: (user, token) =>\n set({ user, token, isAuthenticated: true }),\n logout: () =>\n set({ user: null, token: null, isAuthenticated: false }),\n }),\n { name: 'auth-storage' }\n )\n);\n```\n\n### Step 2.4: Create API Service Layer\n\n```tsx\n// src/services/api/client.ts\nimport axios from 'axios';\nimport { useAuthStore } from '@/store/authStore';\n\nconst client = axios.create({\n baseURL: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:8081/api',\n});\n\nclient.interceptors.request.use((config) => {\n const token = useAuthStore.getState().token;\n if (token) {\n config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;\n }\n return config;\n});\n\nexport default client;\n\n// src/services/api/auth.ts\nimport client from './client';\nimport { User, LoginCredentials } from '@/types/auth';\n\nexport const authService = {\n login: async (credentials: LoginCredentials) => {\n const { data } = await client.post('/auth/login', credentials);\n return data;\n },\n logout: async () => {\n await client.post('/auth/logout');\n },\n signup: async (data: any) => {\n const { data: response } = await client.post('/auth/signup', data);\n return response;\n },\n};\n```\n\n### Step 2.5: Create Custom Hooks\n\n```tsx\n// src/hooks/useAuth.ts\nimport { useAuthStore } from '@/store/authStore';\nimport { authService } from '@/services/api/auth';\nimport { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';\n\nexport function useAuth() {\n const router = useRouter();\n const { user, token, isAuthenticated, setAuth, logout: storeLogout } = useAuthStore();\n\n const login = async (email: string, password: string) => {\n const response = await authService.login({ email, password });\n setAuth(response.user, response.token);\n router.push('/');\n };\n\n const logout = async () => {\n await authService.logout();\n storeLogout();\n router.push('/login');\n };\n\n return { user, token, isAuthenticated, login, logout };\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Phase 3: Component Migration (Days 8-12)\n\n### Step 3.1: Migrate Auth Pages\n\n```tsx\n// app/(auth)/login/page.tsx\n'use client';\n\nimport { LoginForm } from '@/components/auth/LoginForm';\n\nexport default function LoginPage() {\n return (\n <div className=\"flex h-screen\">\n <div className=\"hidden md:flex md:w-1/2 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-blue-600\">\n {/* Hero image */}\n </div>\n <div className=\"w-full md:w-1/2 flex items-center justify-center\">\n <LoginForm />\n </div>\n </div>\n );\n}\n\n// src/components/auth/LoginForm.tsx\n'use client';\n\nimport { useAuth } from '@/hooks/useAuth';\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\nimport { useState } from 'react';\n\nexport function LoginForm() {\n const { login } = useAuth();\n const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n const [error, setError] = useState('');\n const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\n\n const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n e.preventDefault();\n setIsLoading(true);\n setError('');\n try {\n await login(email, password);\n } catch (err: any) {\n setError(err.message || 'Login failed');\n } finally {\n setIsLoading(false);\n }\n };\n\n return (\n <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"w-full max-w-sm space-y-4\">\n <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-bold\">Sign In</h1>\n {error && <div className=\"text-red-600 text-sm\">{error}</div>}\n <Input\n type=\"email\"\n placeholder=\"Email\"\n value={email}\n onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}\n />\n <Input\n type=\"password\"\n placeholder=\"Password\"\n value={password}\n onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}\n />\n <Button type=\"submit\" className=\"w-full\" disabled={isLoading}>\n {isLoading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign In'}\n </Button>\n </form>\n );\n}\n```\n\n### Step 3.2: Migrate Navbar Component\n\n```tsx\n// src/components/common/Navbar/Navbar.tsx\n'use client';\n\nimport { useAuth } from '@/hooks/useAuth';\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\nimport { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';\n\nexport function Navbar() {\n const { user, logout } = useAuth();\n const router = useRouter();\n\n const navItems = user?.role === 'TENANT'\n ? ['Properties', 'Messages', 'Payments']\n : ['Properties', 'Employees', 'Messages'];\n\n return (\n <nav className=\"sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white border-b\">\n <div className=\"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between\">\n <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-blue-600\">RentMate</h1>\n <div className=\"flex gap-8\">\n {navItems.map((item) => (\n <a key={item} href={`/${item.toLowerCase()}`} className=\"hover:text-blue-600\">\n {item}\n </a>\n ))}\n </div>\n <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={logout}>\n Logout\n </Button>\n </div>\n </nav>\n );\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Phase 4: Testing & Deployment (Days 13-15)\n\n### Step 4.1: Test Authentication Flow\n- Test login/logout\n- Test role-based navigation\n- Test persistence across reloads\n\n### Step 4.2: Test Components\n- Test responsive design\n- Test form validation\n- Test error handling\n\n### Step 4.3: Deploy\n```bash\nnpm run build\nnpm run start\n```\n\n---\n\n## Rollback Plan\n\nIf issues arise:\n1. Keep old code in `/pages-old` directory\n2. Use git branches for safe testing\n3. |\n|----------|---------|\n| **REFACTORING_PLAN.md** | Executive summary & problem analysis |\n| **REFACTORING_PLAN_STRUCTURE.md** | New folder structure & organization |\n| **REFACTORING_PLAN_COMPONENTS.md** | Component refactoring examples |\n| **REFACTORING_PLAN_STATE.md** | State management with Zustand |\n| **REFACTORING_PLAN_UI.md** | UI library migration to Shadcn/ui |\n| **REFACTORING_IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md** | Step-by-step implementation |\n| **REFACTORING_QUICK_REFERENCE.md** | This file - quick lookup |\n\n---\n\n## Architecture Overview\n\n```\n┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐\n│ Next.js App Router │\n│ app/(auth) | app/(dashboard) │\n└────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────┘\n │\n ┌────────────┴────────────┐\n │ │\n┌───────▼──────────┐ ┌────────▼────────┐\n│ Components │ │ Custom Hooks │\n│ (Shadcn/ui) │ │ (useAuth, etc) │\n└──────────────────┘ └────────┬────────┘\n │\n ┌────────▼────────┐\n │ Zustand Store │\n │ (authStore) │\n └────────┬────────┘\n │\n ┌────────▼────────┐\n │ API Services │\n │ (axios client) │\n └─────────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n## Key Improvements Summary\n\n### Before → After\n\n| Aspect | Before | After |\n|--------|--------|-------|\n| **Routing** | Pages Router + App Router (mixed) | App Router only |\n| **State** | localStorage + useState | Zustand stores |\n| **Styling** | Chakra UI | Shadcn/ui + Tailwind |\n| **Types** | No TypeScript | Full TypeScript |\n| **Components** | Large, monolithic | Small, focused |\n| **Navbar** | 3 duplicated files (291 lines) | 1 unified file (80 lines) |\n| **Auth Logic** | Scattered everywhere | Centralized hook |\n| **API Calls** | Direct fetch + apiClient | Unified axios client |\n| **Error Handling** | Ad-hoc | Systematic |\n\n---\n\n## Installation Commands\n\n```bash\n# Phase 1: Dependencies\nnpm install next@latest react@latest react-dom@latest\nnpm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer\nnpm install zustand zod react-hook-form @hookform/resolvers\nnpm install lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge\nnpm install -D @types/node typescript\n\n# Phase 2: Shadcn/ui\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest init\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest add button input card form dialog\nnpx shadcn-ui@latest add dropdown-menu select tabs toast\n\n# Phase 3: Optional\nnpm install axios\nnpm install @tanstack/react-query # For advanced data fetching\n```\n\n---\n\n## File Creation Checklist\n\n### Core Files to Create\n\n- [ ] `src/types/auth.ts` - Auth types\n- [ ] `src/types/property.ts` - Property types\n- [ ] `src/store/authStore.ts` - Auth state\n- [ ] `src/store/userStore.ts` - User state\n- [ ] `src/hooks/useAuth.ts` - Auth hook\n- [ ] `src/hooks/useUserRole.ts` - Role hook\n- [ ] `src/services/api/client.ts` - API client\n- [ ] `src/services/api/auth.ts` - Auth service\n- [ ] `src/components/common/Navbar/Navbar.tsx` - Unified navbar\n- [ ] `src/components/auth/LoginForm.tsx` - Login form\n- [ ] `src/components/auth/SignupForm.tsx` - Signup form\n- [ ] `src/components/property/PropertyCard.tsx` - Property card\n- [ ] `app/(auth)/login/page.tsx` - Login page\n- [ ] `app/(auth)/signup/page.tsx` - Signup page\n- [ ] `app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx` - Dashboard layout\n- [ ] `app/layout.tsx` - Root layout\n\n---\n\n## Common Patterns\n\n### Using Auth Hook\n\n```tsx\nimport { useAuth } from '@/hooks/useAuth';\n\nexport function MyComponent() {\n const { user, isAuthenticated, logout } = useAuth();\n \n if (!isAuthenticated) return <div>Not logged in</div>;\n \n return <div>Welcome, {user?.name}</div>;\n}\n```\n\n### Using Zustand Store\n\n```tsx\nimport { useAuthStore } from '@/store/authStore';\n\nexport function MyComponent() {\n const { user, token } = useAuthStore();\n \n return <div>{user?.email}</div>;\n}\n```\n\n### Using Shadcn Components\n\n```tsx\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\nimport { Card } from '@/components/ui/card';\n\nexport function MyForm() {\n return (\n <Card>\n <Input placeholder=\"Enter text\" />\n <Button>Submit</Button>\n </Card>\n );\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n### Issue: \"Module not found\"\n- Ensure `tsconfig.json` has correct path aliases\n- Check `@/` points to `src/`\n\n### Issue: \"useAuthStore is not a function\"\n- Ensure Zustand is installed: `npm install zustand`\n- Check store export is correct\n\n### Issue: Styles not applying\n- Ensure Tailwind CSS is initialized\n- Check `tailwind.config.ts` content paths\n- Restart dev server\n\n### Issue: \"Cannot find module 'shadcn/ui'\"\n- Run `npx shadcn-ui@latest init` first\n- Then add components: `npx shadcn-ui@latest add button`\n\n---\n\n## Performance Tips\n\n1. **Code Splitting**: Use dynamic imports for large components\n```tsx\nconst HeavyComponent = dynamic(() => import('@/components/Heavy'));\n```\n\n2. **Image Optimization**: Use Next.js Image component\n```tsx\nimport Image from 'next/image';\n<Image src=\"...\" alt=\"...\" width={400} height={300} />\n```\n\n3. **Memoization**: Prevent unnecessary re-renders\n```tsx\nconst MyComponent = React.memo(({ prop }) => <div>{prop}</div>);\n```\n\n4. **Lazy Loading**: Load data on demand\n```tsx\nconst { data } = useQuery(['properties'], fetchProperties);\n```\n\n---\n\n## Resources\n\n- [Next.js Docs](https://nextjs.org/docs)\n- [Shadcn/ui Components](https://ui.shadcn.com)\n- [Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com)\n- [Zustand](https://github.com/pmndrs/zustand)\n- [React Hook Form](https://react-hook-form.com)\n- [Zod Validation](https://zod.dev)\n\n"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":3,"type":2,"content":""},{"id":4,"type":3,"content":""}],"seen_state":"unseen","structured_request_nodes":[{"id":1,"type":1,"tool_result_node":{"content":"File Duration:** 4-5 weeks \n**Team Size:** 1-2 developers \n**Complexity:** High (major architectural changes)\n\n---\n\n## Week 1: Foundation & Setup\n\n### Days 1-2: Environment Setup\n- [ ] Upgrade Next.js, React, React-DOM\n- [ ] Remove Chakra UI dependencies\n- [ ] Install Tailwind CSS\n- [ ] Initialize TypeScript\n- [ ] Create `tsconfig.json` with path aliases\n- [ ] Set up Shadcn/ui\n- [ ] Install state management (Zustand)\n\n**Deliverable:** Clean development environment ready for refactoring\n\n### Days 3-4: Type System\n- [ ] Create `/src/types/` directory\n- [ ] Define auth types (`User`, `UserRole`, `LoginCredentials`)\n- [ ] Define property types (`Property`, `PropertyFilters`)\n- [ ] Define maintenance types\n- [ ] Define API response types\n- [ ] Create type index file\n\n**Deliverable:** Complete type definitions for entire app\n\n### Days 5-7: State Management\n- [ ] Create Zustand stores:\n - [ ] `authStore.ts` - Auth state\n - [ ] `userStore.ts` - User profile\n - [ ] `propertyStore.ts` - Properties list\n - [ ] `uiStore.ts` - UI state (modals, notifications)\n- [ ] Add persistence middleware\n- [ ] Create custom hooks:\n - [ ] `useAuth.ts`\n - [ ] `useUserRole.ts`\n - [ ] `useProperties.ts`\n\n**Deliverable:** Centralized state management system\n\n---\n\n## Week 2: Architecture & Services\n\n### Days 8-9: API Service Layer\n- [ ] Create API client with axios\n- [ ] Set up request/response interceptors\n- [ ] Create service modules:\n - [ ] `auth.ts` - Login, signup, logout\n - [ ] `properties.ts` - CRUD operations\n - [ ] `maintenance.ts` - Maintenance requests\n - [ ] `messages.ts` - Messaging\n - [ ] `payments.ts` - Payment operations\n\n**Deliverable:** Centralized API communication\n\n### Days 10-11: Folder Structure Migration\n- [ ] Create new folder structure\n- [ ] Move components to `/src/components/`\n- [ ] Organize by feature (auth, property, maintenance)\n- [ ] Create layout groups in `/app`\n- [ ] Set up `/src/hooks/`, `/src/services/`, `/src/lib/`\n\n**Deliverable:** Clean, organized folder structure\n\n### Days 12-14: Root & Layout Components\n- [ ] Create `app/layout.tsx` (root layout)\n- [ ] Create `app/(auth)/layout.tsx` (auth layout)\n- [ ] Create `app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx` (dashboard layout)\n- [ ] Implement hydration logic\n- [ ] Create error boundary\n- [ ] Add loading states\n\n**Deliverable:** Working layout system with proper routing\n\n---\n\n## Week 3: Component Refactoring\n\n### Days 15-17: Auth Components\n- [ ] Refactor `LoginForm.tsx`\n- [ ] Refactor IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "file_content": "# Critical Code Examples\n\n## 1. Root Layout with Hydration\n\n```tsx\n// app/layout.tsx\n'use client';\n\nimport { useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useAuthStore } from '@/store/authStore';\nimport './globals.css';\n\nexport default function RootLayout({ children }) {\n const hydrate = useAuthStore((state) => state.hydrate);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n // Restore auth state from localStorage on app load\n hydrate();\n }, [hydrate]);\n\n return (\n <html lang=\"en\">\n <body className=\"bg-gray-50\">\n {children}\n </body>\n </html>\n );\n}\n```\n\n## 2. Auth Layout (No Navbar)\n\n```tsx\n// app/(auth)/layout.tsx\nexport default function AuthLayout({ children }) {\n return (\n <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center\">\n {children}\n </div>\n );\n}\n```\n\n## 3. Dashboard Layout (With Navbar)\n\n```tsx\n// app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx\n'use client';\n\nimport { Navbar } from '@/components/common/Navbar';\nimport { useAuth } from '@/hooks/useAuth';\nimport { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';\nimport { useEffect } from 'react';\n\nexport default function DashboardLayout({ children }) {\n const { isAuthenticated } = useAuth();\n const router = useRouter();\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (!isAuthenticated) {\n router.push('/login');\n }\n }, [isAuthenticated, router]);\n\n if (!isAuthenticated) return null;\n\n return (\n <div className=\"flex flex-col h-screen\">\n <Navbar />\n <main className=\"flex-1 overflow-auto\">\n {children}\n </main>\n </div>\n );\n}\n```\n\n## 4. Auth Store with Persistence\n\n```tsx\n// src/store/authStore.ts\nimport { create } from 'zustand';\nimport { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';\nimport { User } from '@/types/auth';\n\ninterface AuthState {\n user: User | null;\n token: string | null;\n isAuthenticated: boolean;\n setAuth: (user: User, token: string) => void;\n logout: () => void;\n hydrate: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const useAuthStore = create<AuthState>()(\n persist(\n (set) => ({\n user: null,\n token: null,\n isAuthenticated: false,\n\n setAuth: (user, token) =>\n set({\n user,\n token,\n isAuthenticated: true,\n }),\n\n logout: () =>\n set({\n user: null,\n token: null,\n isAuthenticated: false,\n }),\n\n hydrate: () => {\n // Called on app startup\n const stored = localStorage.getItem('auth-storage');\n if (stored) {\n try {\n const { state } = JSON.parse(stored);\n set(state);\n } catch (err) {\n console.error('Failed to hydrate auth', err);\n }\n }\n },\n }),\n {\n name: 'auth-storage',\n partialize: (state) => ({\n user: state.user,\n token: state.token,\n isAuthenticated: state.isAuthenticated,\n }),\n }\n )\n);\n```\n\n## 5. API Client with Interceptors\n\n```tsx\n// src/services/api/client.ts\nimport axios from 'axios';\nimport { useAuthStore } from '@/store/authStore';\n\nconst client = axios.create({\n baseURL: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:8081/api',\n timeout: 10000,\n});\n\n// Request interceptor\nclient.interceptors.request.use(\n (config) => {\n const token = useAuthStore.getState().token;\n if (token) {\n config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;\n }\n return config;\n },\n (error) => Promise.reject(error)\n);\n\n// Response interceptor\nclient.interceptors.response.use(\n (response) => response,\n (error) => {\n if (error.response?.status === 401) {\n // Token expired, logout user\n useAuthStore.getState().logout();\n window.location.href = '/login';\n }\n return Promise.reject(error);\n }\n);\n\nexport default client;\n```\n\n## 6. Auth Service\n\n```tsx\n// src/services/api/auth.ts\nimport client from './client';\nimport { User, LoginCredentials, SignupData } from '@/types/auth';\n\ninterface AuthResponse {\n user: User;\n token: string;\n}\n\nexport const authService = {\n login: async (credentials: LoginCredentials): Promise<AuthResponse> => {\n const { data } = await client.post('/auth/login', credentials);\n return data;\n },\n\n signup: async (data: SignupData): Promise<AuthResponse> => {\n const { data: response } = await client.post('/auth/signup', data);\n return response;\n },\n\n logout: async (): Promise<void> => {\n await client.post('/auth/logout');\n },\n\n refreshToken: async (): Promise<string> => {\n const { data } = await client.post('/auth/refresh');\n return data.token;\n },\n};\n```\n\n## 7. useAuth Hook\n\n```tsx\n// src/hooks/useAuth.ts\nimport { useAuthStore } from '@/store/authStore';\nimport { authService } from '@/services/api/auth';\nimport { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';\nimport { useState } from 'react';\n\nexport function useAuth() {\n const router = useRouter();\n const { user, token, isAuthenticated, setAuth, logout: storeLogout } = useAuthStore();\n const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\n const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n const login = async (email: string, password: string) => {\n setIsLoading(true);\n setError(null);\n try {\n const response = await authService.login({ email, password });\n setAuth(response.user, response.token);\n router.push('/');\n } catch (err: any) {\n const message = err.response?.data?.message || err.message || 'Login failed';\n setError(message);\n throw err;\n } finally {\n setIsLoading(false);\n }\n };\n\n const logout = async () => {\n setIsLoading(true);\n try {\n await authService.logout();\n storeLogout();\n router.push('/login');\n } catch (err) {\n console.error('Logout error:', err);\n storeLogout(); // Force logout even if API call fails\n } finally {\n setIsLoading(false);\n }\n };\n\n return {\n user,\n token,\n isAuthenticated,\n isLoading,\n error,\n login,\n logout,\n };\n}\n```\n\n## 8. Login Form Component\n\n```tsx\n// src/components/auth/LoginForm.tsx\n'use client';\n\nimport { useState } from 'react';\nimport { useAuth } from '@/hooks/useAuth';\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\nimport { Card } from '@/components/ui/card';\nimport Link from 'next/link';\n\nexport function LoginForm() {\n const { login, isLoading, error } = useAuth();\n const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n\n const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n e.preventDefault();\n try {\n await login(email, password);\n } catch (err) {\n // Error is handled by useAuth hook\n }\n };\n\n return (\n <Card className=\"w-full max-w-sm p-6\">\n <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-4\">\n <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold\">Sign In</h1>\n\n {error && (\n <div className=\"bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-red-700 px-4 py-2 rounded\">\n {error}\n </div>\n )}\n\n <Input\n type=\"email\"\n placeholder=\"Email\"\n value={email}\n onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}\n disabled={isLoading}\n />\n\n <Input\n type=\"password\"\n placeholder=\"Password\"\n value={password}\n onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}\n disabled={isLoading}\n />\n\n <Button type=\"submit\" className=\"w-full\" disabled={isLoading}>\n {isLoading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign In'}\n </Button>\n\n <div className=\"text-sm text-gray-600\">\n Don't have an account?{' '}\n <Link href=\"/signup\" className=\"text-blue-600 hover:underline\">\n Sign up\n </Link>\n </div>\n </form>\n </Card>\n );\n}\n```\n\n## 9. Type Definitions\n\n```tsx\n// src/types/auth.ts\nexport type UserRole = 'GUEST' | 'TENANT' | 'LANDLORD' | 'PROPERTY_MANAGER';\n\nexport interface User {\n id: string;\n email: string;\n name: string;\n phone?: string;\n role: UserRole;\n avatar?: string;\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface LoginCredentials {\n email: string;\n password: string;\n}\n\nexport interface SignupData extends LoginCredentials {\n name: string;\n phone: string;\n role: UserRole;\n}\n\n// src/types/property.ts\nexport interface Property {\n id: string;\n title: string;\n description: string;\n price: number;\n location: string;\n category: string;\n availability: 'available' | 'unavailable';\n coverPhoto?: { url: string };\n images?: Array<{ url: string }>;\n landlordId: string;\n createdAt: string;\n}\n```\n\n"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":3,"type":2,"content":""},{"id":4,"type":3,"content":""}],"seen_state":"unseen","structured_request_nodes":[{"id":1,"type":1,"tool_result_node":{"content":"File saved.
