 21	export default function PropertyDetailsPage() {
 22	 const router = useRouter();
 23	 const { id } = router.query;
 24	 const toast = useToast();
 25	 const { role, isAuthenticated } = useAuth();
 26	
 27	 const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 28	 const [property, setProperty] = useState(null);
 29	 const [managerEmail, setManagerEmail] = useState('');
 30	 const canManage = role === 'LANDLORD';
 31	
 32	 useEffect(() => {
 33	 if (!id) return;
 34	 const load = async () => {
 35	 setLoading(true);
 36	 try {
 37	 const data = await apiGet(`/properties/${id}`);
 38	 setProperty(data);
 39	 } catch (e) {
 40	 console.error(e);
 41	 toast({ status: 'error', title: 'Failed to load property' });
 42	 } finally {
 43	 setLoading(false);
 44	 }
 45	 };
 46	 load();
 47	 }, [id, toast]);
 48	
 49	 const assignManager = async () => {
 50	 if (!managerEmail) return;
 51	 try {
 52	 const updated = await apiPut(`/properties/${id}/manager`, { managerEmail });
 53	 setProperty(updated);
 54	 setManagerEmail('');
 55	 toast({ status: 'success', title: 'Manager assigned' });
 56	 } catch (e) {
 57	 console.error(e);
 58	 toast({ status: 'error', title: 'Failed to assign manager' });
 59	 }
 60	 };
 61	
 62	 const removeManager = async () => {
 63	 try {
 64	 const updated = await apiDelete(`/properties/${id}/manager`);
 65	 // API returns updated property or 200; if null, reload
 66	 if (updated) setProperty(updated);
 67	 else {
 68	 const data = await apiGet(`/properties/${id}`);
 69	 setProperty(data);
 70	 }
 71	 toast({ status: 'success', title: 'Manager removed' });
 72	 } catch (e) {
 73	 console.error(e);
 74	 toast({ status: 'error', title: 'Failed to remove manager' });
 75	 }
 76	 };
 77	
 78	 const deleteProperty = async () => {
 79	 if (!confirm('Delete this property? This cannot be undone.')) return;
 80	 try {
 81	 await apiDelete(`/properties/${id}`);
 82	 toast({ status: 'success', title: 'Property deleted' });
 83	 router.push('/properties');
 84	 } catch (e) {
 85	 console.error(e);
 86	 toast({ status: 'error', title: 'Failed to delete property' });
 87	 }
 88	 };
 89	
 90	 if (loading) {
 91	 return (
 92	 <Flex minH="60vh" align="center" justify="center">
 93	 <Spinner size="xl" />
 94	 </Flex>
 95	 );
 96	 }
 97	
 98	 if (!property) {
 99	 return (
 100	 <Flex minH="60vh" align="center" justify="center">
 101	 <Text>Property not found.</Text>
 102	 </Flex>
 103	 );
 104	 }
 105	
 106	 const coverUrl = property.coverImageUrl || property.coverPhoto?.url || '/placeholder-property.jpg';
 107	
 108	 return (
 109	 <Box maxW="1100px" mx="auto" p={6}>
 110	 <Flex gap={8} direction={{ base: 'column', md: 'row' }}>
 111	 <Box flex="1">
 112	 <ChakraImage src={coverUrl} alt={property.title} w="100%" h="320px" objectFit="cover" rounded="lg" />
 113	 <HStack mt={3} spacing={3}>
 114	 <Badge colorScheme={property.status === 'AVAILABLE' ? 'green' : 'orange'}>{property.status || 'AVAILABLE'}</Badge>
 115	 {property.roomAmount && <Badge>{property.roomAmount} rooms</Badge>}
 116	 </HStack>
 117	 </Box>
 118	
 119	 <Box flex="1">
 120	 <Heading size="lg" mb={2}>{property.title || 'Property'}</Heading>
 121	 <Text color="gray.600" mb={2}>{property.address}</Text>
 122	 <Text fontSize="2xl" fontWeight="bold" color="blue.600" mb={4}>
 123	 {property.rentAmount ? `$${Number(property.rentAmount).toLocaleString()}/mo` : ''}
 124	 </Text>
 125	
 126	 <Divider my={4} />
 127	
 128	 <VStack align="stretch" spacing={3}>
 129	 <Text><b>Landlord:</b> {property.landlord?.fullName || property.landlord?.email || 'N/A'}</Text>
 130	 <Text><b>Manager:</b> {property.manager?.fullName || property.manager?.email || 'None'}</Text>
 131	 </VStack>
 132	
 133	 {canManage && (
 134	 <Box mt={6}>
 135	 <Heading size="sm" mb={2}>Manage Assignment</Heading>
 136	 <HStack>
 137	 <Input placeholder="Manager email" value={managerEmail} onChange={(e) => setManagerEmail(e.target.value)} />
 138	 <Button colorScheme="blue" onClick={assignManager}>Assign</Button>
 139	 <Button variant="outline" onClick={removeManager}>Remove</Button>
 140	 </HStack>
 141	 <Button mt={4} colorScheme="red" variant="solid" onClick={deleteProperty}>Delete Property</Button>
 142	 </Box>
 143	 )}

 146	 </Box>
 147	 );

 5	import { useAuth } from "../src/hooks/useAuth";
 6	import { apiGet, apiPost } from "../utils/apiClient";
 7	import {
 8	 Box,
 9	 Flex,
 10	 Heading,
 11	 Button,
 12	 Table,
 13	 Thead,
 14	 Tbody,
 15	 Tr,
 16	 Th,
 17	 Td,
 18	 Badge,
 19	 Avatar,
 20	 HStack,
 21	 Text,
 22	 IconButton,
 23	 useToast,
 24	 Modal,
 25	 ModalOverlay,
 26	 ModalContent,
 27	 ModalHeader,
 28	 ModalBody,
 29	 ModalFooter,
 30	 ModalCloseButton,
 31	 FormControl,
 32	 FormLabel,
 33	 Input,
 34	 Select,
 35	 useDisclosure,
 36	} from "@chakra-ui/react";
 37	import { FiTrash2, FiEdit2 } from "react-icons/fi";
 38	// Removed HeaderLogo per request
 39	
 40	const API_BASE =
 41	 process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:8081/api";
 42	
 43	export default function PaymentsPage() {
 44	 const canRender = useRequireAuth();
 45	 const router = useRouter();
 46	 const { role } = useAuth();
 47	 const { leaseId } = router.query;
 48	 if (!canRender) return null;
 49	 const [payments, setPayments] = useState([]);
 50	 const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 51	 const [selectedPayment, setSelectedPayment] = useState(null);
 52	 const toast = useToast();
 53	 const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure();
 54	 const {
 55	 isOpen: isEditOpen,
 56	 onOpen: onEditOpen,
 57	 onClose: onEditClose,
 58	 } = useDisclosure();
 59	
 60	 // Form state for new/edit payment
 61	 const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
 62	 label: "",
 63	 amount: "",
 64	 tenantId: "",
 65	 payDate: "",
 66	 });
 67	
 68	 useEffect(() => {
 69	 if (leaseId) fetchPayments();
 70	 }, [leaseId]);
 71	
 72	 const fetchPayments = async () => {
 73	 if (!leaseId) {
 74	 setPayments([]);
 75	 return;
 76	 }
 77	 setLoading(true);
 78	 try {
 79	 const data = await apiGet(`/payments/lease/${leaseId}`);
 80	 setPayments(Array.isArray(data) ? data : []);
 81	 } catch (e) {
 82	 console.error(e);
 83	 toast({ status: "error", title: "Failed to load payments" });
 84	 } finally {
 85	 setLoading(false);
 86	 }
 87	 };
 88	
 89	 const handleDelete = async (paymentId) => {
 90	 if (!confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this payment?")) return;
 91	
 92	 try {
 93	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/payments/${paymentId}`, {
 94	 method: "DELETE",
 95	 });
 96	 if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to delete payment");
 97	
 98	 setPayments((prev) => prev.filter((p) => p.id !== paymentId));
 99	 toast({
 100	 status: "success",
 101	 title: "Payment deleted",
 102	 });
 103	 } catch (e) {
 104	 console.error(e);
 105	 toast({
 106	 status: "error",
 107	 title: "Failed to delete payment",
 108	 });
 109	 }
 110	 };
 111	
 112	 const handleOpenNew = () => {
 113	 setFormData({
 114	 label: "",
 115	 amount: "",
 116	 tenantId: "",
 117	 payDate: "",
 118	 });
 119	 setSelectedPayment(null);
 120	 onOpen();
 121	 };
 122	
 123	 const handleOpenEdit = (payment) => {
 124	 setSelectedPayment(payment);
 125	 setFormData({
 126	 label: payment.label || "",
 127	 amount: payment.amount || "",
 128	 status: payment.status || "Pending",
 129	 tenantId: payment.tenant?.id || "",
 130	 payDate: payment.payDate || "",
 131	 });
 132	 onEditOpen();
 133	 };
 134	
 135	 const handleSubmit = async () => {
 136	 if (!leaseId) return;
 137	 try {
 138	 const payload = {
 139	 amount: parseFloat(formData.amount || 0),
 140	 paymentDate: formData.payDate || null,
 141	 type: formData.type || 'RENT',
 142	 paymentMethod: formData.paymentMethod || 'Online Portal',
 143	 description: formData.label || '',
 144	 };
 145	
 146	 const endpoint = role === 'TENANT'
 147	 ? `/payments/lease/${leaseId}/pay`
 148	 : `/payments/lease/${leaseId}`;
 149	
 150	 const newPayment = await apiPost(endpoint, payload);
 151	
 152	 setPayments((prev) => [...prev, newPayment]);
 153	 toast({ status: "success", title: "Payment created" });
 154	 onClose();
 155	 } catch (e) {
 156	 console.error(e);
 157	 toast({ status: "error", title: "Failed to create payment" });
 158	 }
 159	 };
 160	
 161	 const handleUpdate = async () => {
 162	 if (!selectedPayment) return;
 163	
 164	 try {
 165	 const payload = {
 166	 ...formData,
 167	 amount: parseFloat(formData.amount),
 168	 };
 169	
 170	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/payments/${selectedPayment.id}`, {
 171	 method: "PUT",
 172	 headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
 173	 body: JSON.stringify(payload),
 174	 });
 175	
 176	 if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to update payment");
 177	 const updated = await res.json();
 178	
 179	 setPayments((prev) =>
 180	 prev.map((p) => (p.id === updated.id ? updated : p))
 181	 );
 182	 toast({
 183	 status: "success",
 184	 title: "Payment updated",
 185	 });
 186	 onEditClose();
 187	 } catch (e) {
 188	 console.error(e);
 189	 toast({
 190	 status: "error",
 191	 title: "Failed to update payment",
 192	 });
 193	 }
 194	 };
 195	
 196	 const formatDate = (dateString) => {
 197	 if (!dateString) return "";
 198	 const date = new Date(dateString);
 199	 return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
 200	 month: "short",
 201	 day: "numeric",
 202	 year: "numeric",
 203	 });
 204	 };
 205	
 206	 return (
 207	 <Box minH="100vh" bg="gray.50">
 208	
 209	 {/* Main Content */}
 210	 <Box maxW="1400px" mx="auto" p={8}>
 211	 <Flex justify="space-between" align="center" mb={6}>
 212	 <HStack spacing={3}>
 213	 <Heading size="lg">Payments</Heading>
 214	 <Badge colorScheme="blue" fontSize="sm" px={3} py={1} rounded="full">
 215	 {payments.length} transactions
 216	 </Badge>
 217	 </HStack>
 218	 <Button colorScheme="blue" onClick={handleOpenNew}>
 219	 New Payment
 220	 </Button>
 221	 </Flex>
 222	
 223	 {/* Payments Table */}
 224	 <Box bg="white" rounded="lg" shadow="sm" overflow="hidden">
 225	 <Table variant="simple">
 226	 <Thead bg="gray.50">
 227	 <Tr>
 228	 <Th>Label</Th>
 229	 <Th>Amount</Th>
 230	 <Th>Bill Number</Th>
 231	 <Th>Status</Th>
 232	 <Th>Tenant</Th>
 233	 <Th>Pay Date</Th>
 234	 <Th></Th>
 235	 </Tr>
 236	 </Thead>
 237	 <Tbody>
 238	 {loading ? (
 239	 <Tr>
 240	 <Td colSpan={7} textAlign="center" py={8}>
 241	 Loading...
 242	 </Td>
 243	 </Tr>
 244	 ) : payments.length === 0 ? (
 245	 <Tr>
 246	 <Td colSpan={7} textAlign="center" py={8}>
 247	 No payments found
 248	 </Td>
 249	 </Tr>
 250	 ) : (
 251	 payments.map((payment) => (
 252	 <Tr key={payment.id} _hover={{ bg: "gray.50" }}>
 253	 <Td fontWeight="medium">{payment.label}</Td>
 254	 <Td>{payment.amount?.toLocaleString()}</Td>
 255	 <Td color="gray.600">{payment.billNumber}</Td>
 256	 <Td>
 257	 <Badge
 258	 colorScheme={
 259	 payment.status === "Paid" ? "green" : "orange"
 260	 }
 261	 px={3}
 262	 py={1}
 263	 rounded="full"
 264	 >
 265	 {payment.status}
 266	 </Badge>
 267	 </Td>
 268	 <Td>
 269	 <HStack spacing={2}>
 270	 <Avatar
 271	 size="sm"
 272	 name={payment.tenant?.name || "Tenant"}
 273	 bg="red.500"
 274	 />
 275	 <Text>{payment.tenant?.name || "N/A"}</Text>
 276	 </HStack>
 277	 </Td>
 278	 <Td color="gray.600">{formatDate(payment.payDate)}</Td>
 279	 <Td>
 280	 <HStack spacing={2}>
 281	 <IconButton
 282	 aria-label="Delete payment"
 283	 icon={<FiTrash2 />}
 284	 size="sm"
 285	 variant="ghost"
 286	 colorScheme="red"
 287	 onClick={() => handleDelete(payment.id)}
 288	 />
 289	 <IconButton
 290	 aria-label="Edit payment"
 291	 icon={<FiEdit2 />}
 292	 size="sm"
 293	 variant="ghost"
 294	 colorScheme="blue"
 295	 onClick={() => handleOpenEdit(payment)}
 296	 />
 297	 </HStack>
 298	 </Td>
 299	 </Tr>
 300	 ))
 301	 )}
 302	 </Tbody>
 303	 </Table>
 304	 </Box>
 305	 </Box>
 306	
 307	 {/* New Payment Modal */}
 308	 <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} size="lg">
 309	 <ModalOverlay />
 310	 <ModalContent>
 311	 <ModalHeader>New Payment</ModalHeader>
 312	 <ModalCloseButton />
 313	 <ModalBody pb={6}>
 314	 <FormControl mb={4}>
 315	 <FormLabel>Label</FormLabel>
 316	 <Input
 317	 placeholder="e.g., Monthly Payout"
 318	 value={formData.label}
 319	 onChange={(e) =>
 320	 setFormData({ ...formData, label: e.target.value })
 321	 }
 322	 />
 323	 </FormControl>
 324	
 325	 <FormControl mb={4}>
 326	 <FormLabel>Amount</FormLabel>
 327	 <Input
 328	 type="number"
 329	 placeholder="e.g., 54000"
 330	 value={formData.amount}
 331	 onChange={(e) =>
 332	 setFormData({ ...formData, amount: e.target.value })
 333	 }
 334	 />
 335	 </FormControl>
 336	
 337	 <FormControl mb={4}>
 338	 <FormLabel>Tenant ID</FormLabel>
 339	 <Input
 340	 placeholder="Tenant ID"
 341	 value={formData.tenantId}
 342	 onChange={(e) =>
 343	 setFormData({ ...formData, tenantId: e.target.value })
 344	 }
 345	 />
 346	 </FormControl>
 347	
 348	 <FormControl>
 349	 <FormLabel>Pay Date</FormLabel>
 350	 <Input
 351	 type="date"
 352	 value={formData.payDate}
 353	 onChange={(e) =>
 354	 setFormData({ ...formData, payDate: e.target.value })
 355	 }
 356	 />
 357	 </FormControl>
 358	 </ModalBody>
 359	
 360	 <ModalFooter>
 361	 <Button variant="ghost" mr={3} onClick={onClose}>
 362	 Cancel
 363	 </Button>
 364	 <Button colorScheme="blue" onClick={handleSubmit}>
 365	 Create Payment
 366	 </Button>
 367	 </ModalFooter>
 368	 </ModalContent>
 369	 </Modal>
 370	
 371	 {/* Edit Payment Modal */}
 372	 <Modal isOpen={isEditOpen} onClose={onEditClose} size="lg">
 373	 <ModalOverlay />
 374	 <ModalContent>
 375	 <ModalHeader>Edit Payment</ModalHeader>
 376	 <ModalCloseButton />
 377	 <ModalBody pb={6}>
 378	 <FormControl mb={4}>
 379	 <FormLabel>Label</FormLabel>
 380	 <Input
 381	 placeholder="e.g., Monthly Payout"
 382	 value={formData.label}
 383	 onChange={(e) =>
 384	 setFormData({ ...formData, label: e.target.value })
 385	 }
 386	 />
 387	 </FormControl>
 388	
 389	 <FormControl mb={4}>
 390	 <FormLabel>Amount</FormLabel>
 391	 <Input
 392	 type="number"
 393	 placeholder="e.g., 54000"
 394	 value={formData.amount}
 395	 onChange={(e) =>
 396	 setFormData({ ...formData, amount: e.target.value })
 397	 }
 398	 />
 399	 </FormControl>
 400	
 401	 <FormControl mb={4}>
 402	 <FormLabel>Status</FormLabel>
 403	 <Select
 404	 value={formData.status}
 405	 onChange={(e) =>
 406	 setFormData({ ...formData, status: e.target.value })
 407	 }
 408	 >
 409	 <option value="Pending">Pending</option>
 410	 <option value="Paid">Paid</option>
 411	 </Select>
 412	 </FormControl>
 413	
 414	 <FormControl mb={4}>
 415	 <FormLabel>Tenant ID</FormLabel>
 416	 <Input
 417	 placeholder="Tenant ID"
 418	 value={formData.tenantId}
 419	 onChange={(e) =>
 420	 setFormData({ ...formData, tenantId: e.target.value })
 421	 }
 422	 />
 423	 </FormControl>
 424	
 425	 <FormControl>
 426	 <FormLabel>Pay Date</FormLabel>
 427	 <Input
 428	 type="date"
 429	 value={formData.payDate}
 430	 onChange={(e) =>
 431	 setFormData({ ...formData, payDate: e.target.value })
 432	 }
 433	 />
 434	 </FormControl>
 435	 </ModalBody>
 436	
 437	 <ModalFooter>
 438	 <Button variant="ghost" mr={3} onClick={onEditClose}>
 439	 Cancel
 440	 </Button>
 441	 <Button colorScheme="blue" onClick={handleUpdate}>
 442	 Update Payment
 443	 </Button>
 444	 </ModalFooter>
 445	 </ModalContent>
 446	 </Modal>
 447	 </Box>
 448	 );

 1	// pages/employees.js
 2	import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
 3	import { useRouter } from "next/router";
 4	import {
 5	 Box,
 6	 Flex,
 7	 Heading,
 8	 Button,
 9	 Table,
 10	 Thead,
 11	 Tbody,
 12	 Tr,
 13	 Th,
 14	 Td,
 15	 Avatar,
 16	 HStack,
 17	 Text,
 18	 Badge,
 19	 IconButton,
 20	 useToast,
 21	 Modal,
 22	 ModalOverlay,
 23	 ModalContent,
 24	 ModalHeader,
 25	 ModalBody,
 26	 ModalFooter,
 27	 ModalCloseButton,
 28	 FormControl,
 29	 FormLabel,
 30	 Input,
 31	 Select,
 32	 useDisclosure,
 33	 Checkbox,
 34	} from "@chakra-ui/react";
 35	import { FiTrash2, FiEdit2 } from "react-icons/fi";
 36	
 37	const API_BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:8081/api";
 38	
 39	export default function EmployeesPage() {
 40	 const toast = useToast();
 41	 const router = useRouter();
 42	 const [employees, setEmployees] = useState([]);
 43	 const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 44	 const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure();
 45	 const {
 46	 isOpen: isEditOpen,
 47	 onOpen: onEditOpen,
 48	 onClose: onEditClose,
 49	 } = useDisclosure();
 50	
 51	 const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
 52	 name: "",
 53	 email: "",
 54	 status: "On Job",
 55	 hireDate: "",
 56	 });
 57	 const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null);
 58	
 59	 useEffect(() => {
 60	 fetchEmployees();
 61	 }, []);
 62	
 63	 const fetchEmployees = async () => {
 64	 setLoading(true);
 65	 try {
 66	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/employees`);
 67	 if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to load employees");
 68	 const data = await res.json();
 69	 // Map any 'Pending' status to 'On Job' per requirement
 70	 const normalized = Array.isArray(data)
 71	 ? data.map((e) => ({
 72	 ...e,
 73	 status: e.status === "Pending" ? "On Job" : e.status,
 74	 }))
 75	 : [];
 76	 setEmployees(normalized);
 77	 } catch (e) {
 78	 console.error(e);
 79	 // Fallback demo data to visualize UI if API missing
 80	 setEmployees([
 81	 {
 82	 id: 1,
 83	 name: "Olivia Rhye",
 84	 handle: "@olivia",
 85	 email: "olivia@untitledui.com",
 86	 status: "On Job",
 87	 hireDate: "2022-01-06",
 88	 role: "Manager",
 89	 avatarColor: "purple.500",
 90	 },
 91	 {
 92	 id: 2,
 93	 name: "Phoenix Baker",
 94	 handle: "@phoenix",
 95	 email: "phoenix@untitledui.com",
 96	 status: "Suspended",
 97	 hireDate: "2022-01-06",
 98	 role: "Manager",
 99	 avatarColor: "orange.500",
 100	 },
 101	 {
 102	 id: 3,
 103	 name: "Lana Steiner",
 104	 handle: "@lana",
 105	 email: "lana@untitledui.com",
 106	 status: "On Job",
 107	 hireDate: "2022-01-06",
 108	 role: "Manager",
 109	 avatarColor: "pink.500",
 110	 },
 111	 ]);
 112	 } finally {
 113	 setLoading(false);
 114	 }
 115	 };
 116	
 117	 const openNew = () => {
 118	 setFormData({ name: "", email: "", status: "On Job", hireDate: "" });
 119	 setSelected(null);
 120	 onOpen();
 121	 };
 122	
 123	 const openEdit = (emp) => {
 124	 setSelected(emp);
 125	 setFormData({
 126	 name: emp.name || "",
 127	 email: emp.email || "",
 128	 status: emp.status || "Pending",
 129	 hireDate: emp.hireDate || "",
 130	 });
 131	 onEditOpen();
 132	 };
 133	
 134	 const createEmployee = async () => {
 135	 try {
 136	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/employees`, {
 137	 method: "POST",
 138	 headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
 139	 body: JSON.stringify(formData),
 140	 });
 141	 const created = res.ok ? await res.json() : { id: Date.now(), ...formData };
 142	 setEmployees((prev) => [...prev, created]);
 143	 toast({ status: "success", title: "Employee added" });
 144	 onClose();
 145	 } catch (e) {
 146	 console.error(e);
 147	 toast({ status: "error", title: "Failed to add employee" });
 148	 }
 149	 };
 150	
 151	 const updateEmployee = async () => {
 152	 if (!selected) return;
 153	 try {
 154	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/employees/${selected.id}`, {
 155	 method: "PUT",
 156	 headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
 157	 body: JSON.stringify(formData),
 158	 });
 159	 const updated = res.ok ? await res.json() : { ...selected, ...formData };
 160	 setEmployees((prev) => prev.map((e) => (e.id === updated.id ? updated : e)));
 161	 toast({ status: "success", title: "Employee updated" });
 162	 onEditClose();
 163	 } catch (e) {
 164	 console.error(e);
 165	 toast({ status: "error", title: "Failed to update employee" });
 166	 }
 167	 };
 168	
 169	 const deleteEmployee = async (id) => {
 170	 if (!confirm("Remove this employee?")) return;
 171	 try {
 172	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/employees/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
 173	 if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to delete");
 174	 setEmployees((prev) => prev.filter((e) => e.id !== id));
 175	 toast({ status: "success", title: "Employee removed" });
 176	 } catch (e) {
 177	 console.error(e);
 178	 // Optimistic removal if API missing
 179	 setEmployees((prev) => prev.filter((e) => e.id !== id));
 180	 toast({ status: "success", title: "Employee removed" });
 181	 }
 182	 };
 183	
 184	 const statusBadge = (status) => {
 185	 const map = {
 186	 "On Job": { color: "green", label: "On Job" },
 187	 "Suspended": { color: "red", label: "Suspended" },
 188	 // Pending removed
 189	 };
 190	 const meta = map[status] || { color: "gray", label: status };
 191	 return (
 192	 <Badge colorScheme={meta.color} px={3} py={1} rounded="full">
 193	 {meta.label}
 194	 </Badge>
 195	 );
 196	 };
 197	
 198	 return (
 199	 <Box minH="100vh" bg="gray.50">
 200	 {/* No logo/header per request */}
 201	 <Box maxW="1200px" mx="auto" p={8}>
 202	 <Flex justify="space-between" align="center" mb={6}>
 203	 <Heading size="lg">Employees</Heading>
 204	 <Button colorScheme="blue" onClick={openNew}>+ New</Button>
 205	 </Flex>
 206	
 207	 <Box bg="white" rounded="lg" shadow="sm" overflow="hidden">
 208	 <Table variant="simple">
 209	 <Thead bg="gray.50">
 210	 <Tr>
 211	 <Th>Name</Th>
 212	 <Th>Status</Th>
 213	 <Th>Email address</Th>
 214	 <Th>Hired Date</Th>
 215	 <Th></Th>
 216	 </Tr>
 217	 </Thead>
 218	 <Tbody>
 219	 {loading ? (
 220	 <Tr>
 221	 <Td colSpan={5} textAlign="center" py={8}>Loading...</Td>
 222	 </Tr>
 223	 ) : employees.length === 0 ? (
 224	 <Tr>
 225	 <Td colSpan={5} textAlign="center" py={8}>No employees</Td>
 226	 </Tr>
 227	 ) : (
 228	 employees.map((emp) => (
 229	 <Tr key={emp.id} _hover={{ bg: "gray.50" }}>
 230	 <Td>
 231	 <HStack spacing={3}>
 232	 <Avatar 
 233	 size="sm" 
 234	 name={emp.name} 
 235	 bg={emp.avatarColor || "gray.500"} 
 236	 cursor="pointer"
 237	 onClick={() => router.push(`/profile/${emp.id}`)}
 238	 _hover={{ opacity: 0.8 }}
 239	 />
 240	 <Box>
 241	 <Text fontWeight="medium">{emp.name}</Text>
 242	 </Box>
 243	 </HStack>
 244	 </Td>
 245	 <Td>{statusBadge(emp.status)}</Td>
 246	 <Td color="gray.700">{emp.email}</Td>
 247	 <Td color="gray.600">{new Date(emp.hireDate).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" })}</Td>
 248	 <Td>
 249	 <HStack spacing={2}>
 250	 <IconButton aria-label="Delete" icon={<FiTrash2 />} size="sm" variant="ghost" colorScheme="red" onClick={() => deleteEmployee(emp.id)} />
 251	 <IconButton aria-label="Edit" icon={<FiEdit2 />} size="sm" variant="ghost" colorScheme="blue" onClick={() => openEdit(emp)} />
 252	 </HStack>
 253	 </Td>
 254	 </Tr>
 255	 ))
 256	 )}
 257	 </Tbody>
 258	 </Table>
 259	 </Box>
 260	 </Box>
 261	
 262	 {/* New Employee Modal */}
 263	 <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} size="lg">
 264	 <ModalOverlay />
 265	 <ModalContent>
 266	 <ModalHeader>New Employee</ModalHeader>
 267	 <ModalCloseButton />
 268	 <ModalBody pb={6}>
 269	 <FormControl mb={4}>
 270	 <FormLabel>Name</FormLabel>
 271	 <Input value={formData.name} onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, name: e.target.value })} />
 272	 </FormControl>
 273	 <FormControl mb={4}>
 274	 <FormLabel>Email</FormLabel>
 275	 <Input type="email" value={formData.email} onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, email: e.target.value })} />
 276	 </FormControl>
 277	 <FormControl mb={4}>
 278	 <FormLabel>Status</FormLabel>
 279	 <Select value={formData.status} onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, status: e.target.value })}>
 280	 <option value="On Job">On Job</option>
 281	 <option value="Suspended">Suspended</option>
 282	 </Select>
 283	 </FormControl>
 284	 <FormControl>
 285	 <FormLabel>Hired Date</FormLabel>
 286	 <Input type="date" value={formData.hireDate} onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, hireDate: e.target.value })} />
 287	 </FormControl>
 288	 </ModalBody>
 289	 <ModalFooter>
 290	 <Button variant="ghost" mr={3} onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
 291	 <Button colorScheme="blue" onClick={createEmployee}>Create</Button>
 292	 </ModalFooter>
 293	 </ModalContent>
 294	 </Modal>
 295	
 296	 {/* Edit Employee Modal */}
 297	 <Modal isOpen={isEditOpen} onClose={onEditClose} size="lg">
 298	 <ModalOverlay />
 299	 <ModalContent>
 300	 <ModalHeader>Edit Employee</ModalHeader>
 301	 <ModalCloseButton />
 302	 <ModalBody pb={6}>
 303	 <FormControl mb={4}>
 304	 <FormLabel>Status</FormLabel>
 305	 <Select value={formData.status} onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, status: e.target.value })}>
 306	 <option value="On Job">On Job</option>
 307	 <option value="Suspended">Suspended</option>
 308	 </Select>
 309	 </FormControl>
 310	 <FormControl>
 311	 <FormLabel>Hired Date</FormLabel>
 312	 <Input type="date" value={formData.hireDate} onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, hireDate: e.target.value })} />
 313	 </FormControl>
 314	 </ModalBody>
 315	 <ModalFooter>
 316	 <Button variant="ghost" mr={3} onClick={onEditClose}>Cancel</Button>
 317	 <Button colorScheme="blue" onClick={updateEmployee}>Update</Button>
 318	 </ModalFooter>
 319	 </ModalContent>
 320	 </Modal>
 321	 </Box>
 322	 );
 323	}

 39	export default function EmployeesPage() {
 40	 const toast = useToast();
 41	 const router = useRouter();

 63	 const fetchEmployees = async () => {
 64	 setLoading(true);
 65	 try {
 66	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/employees`);
 67	 if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to load employees");
 68	 const data = await res.json();
 69	 // Map any 'Pending' status to 'On Job' per requirement
 70	 const normalized = Array.isArray(data)
 71	 ? data.map((e) => ({
 72	 ...e,
 73	 status: e.status === "Pending" ? "On Job" : e.status,
 74	 }))
 75	 : [];
 76	 setEmployees(normalized);
 77	 } catch (e) {
 78	 console.error(e);
 79	 // Fallback demo data to visualize UI if API missing
 80	 setEmployees([

 85	 email: "olivia@untitledui.com",
 86	 status: "On Job",

 96	 status: "Suspended",

 129	 hireDate: emp.hireDate || "",

 131	 onEditOpen();

 134	 const createEmployee = async () => {
 135	 try {
 136	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/employees`, {
 137	 method: "POST",
 138	 headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
 139	 body: JSON.stringify(formData),
 140	 });
 141	 const created = res.ok ? await res.json() : { id: Date.now(), ...formData };
 142	 setEmployees((prev) => [...prev, created]);
 143	 toast({ status: "success", title: "Employee added" });
 144	 onClose();
 145	 } catch (e) {
 146	 console.error(e);
 147	 toast({ status: "error", title: "Failed to add employee" });
 148	 }
 149	 };
 150	
 151	 const updateEmployee = async () => {
 152	 if (!selected) return;
 153	 try {
 154	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/employees/${selected.id}`, {
 155	 method: "PUT",
 156	 headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
 157	 body: JSON.stringify(formData),
 158	 });
 159	 const updated = res.ok ? await res.json() : { ...selected, ...formData };
 160	 setEmployees((prev) => prev.map((e) => (e.id === updated.id ? updated : e)));
 161	 toast({ status: "success", title: "Employee updated" });
 162	 onEditClose();
 163	 } catch (e) {
 164	 console.error(e);
 165	 toast({ status: "error", title: "Failed to update employee" });
 166	 }
 167	 };
 168	
 169	 const deleteEmployee = async (id) => {
 170	 if (!confirm("Remove this employee?")) return;
 171	 try {
 172	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/employees/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
 173	 if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to delete");
 174	 setEmployees((prev) => prev.filter((e) => e.id !== id));
 175	 toast({ status: "success", title: "Employee removed" });
 176	 } catch (e) {
 177	 console.error(e);

 98	 direction="column"

 100	 shadow="sm"
 101	 borderRadius="xl"
 102	 >
 103	 {/* Header */}
 104	 <HStack p={4} spacing={3} borderBottom="1px solid #e7e7e7">
 105	 <Avatar size="sm" name={selectedUser} />
 106	 <VStack align="start" spacing={0}>
 107	 <Text fontWeight="bold">{selectedUser}</Text>
 108	 <Text fontSize="xs" color="green.500">
 109	 Online
 110	 </Text>
 111	 </VStack>
 112	 </HStack>
 113	
 114	 {/* Messages */}
 115	 <VStack
 116	 flex="1"
 117	 p={5}
 118	 spacing={4}
 119	 overflowY="auto"
 120	 align="stretch"
 121	 bg={useColorModeValue("#f0f2f5", "gray.700")}
 122	 >
 123	 {chat.map((m, index) => (
 124	 <Flex key={index} justify={m.from === "manager" ? "flex-end" : "flex-start"}>
 125	 <Box
 126	 bg={m.from === "manager" ? "blue.500" : "gray.300"}
 127	 color={m.from === "manager" ? "white" : "black"}
 128	 px={4}
 129	 py={2}
 130	 borderRadius="2xl"
 131	 borderBottomRightRadius={m.from === "manager" ? "0" : "2xl"}
 132	 borderBottomLeftRadius={m.from !== "manager" ? "0" : "2xl"}
 133	 maxW="70%"
 134	 fontSize="sm"
 135	 shadow="md"
 136	 >
 137	 {m.text}
 138	 </Box>
 139	 </Flex>
 140	 ))}
 141	 </VStack>
 142	
 143	 {/* Message Input */}
 144	 <HStack p={4} borderTop="1px solid #e7e7e7" spacing={3}>
 145	 <Input
 146	 placeholder="Type a message..."
 147	 value={message}
 148	 onChange={(e) => setMessage(e.target.value)}
 149	 bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.600")}
 150	 borderRadius="full"
 151	 onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && sendMessage()}
 152	 />
 153	 <IconButton
 154	 icon={<FiSend />}
 155	 colorScheme="blue"
 156	 borderRadius="full"
 157	 size="lg"
 158	 onClick={sendMessage}
 159	 />
 160	 </HStack>
 161	 </Flex>
 162	 </Flex>
 163	 );
 164	}

 53	export default function PropertySelectionPage() {
 54	 const [properties, setProperties] = useState([]);
 55	 const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 56	 const [userRole, setUserRole] = useState(null);
 57	 const router = useRouter();
 58	 const { returnTo } = router.query; // Get the returnTo parameter from URL
 59	
 60	 useEffect(() => {
 61	 // Get user role from localStorage
 62	 const role = localStorage.getItem('role');
 63	 setUserRole(role);
 64	
 65	 async function loadProperties() {
 66	 try {
 67	 // Use mock data for testing
 68	 setProperties(mockProperties);
 69	 
 70	 // Uncomment below to use real API
 71	 // const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/properties`);
 72	 // const data = await res.json();
 73	 // setProperties(data);
 74	 } catch (e) {
 75	 console.error("Failed to load properties", e);
 76	 } finally {
 77	 setLoading(false);
 78	 }
 79	 }
 80	 loadProperties();
 81	 }, []);
 82	
 83	 const handleSelect = (id) => {
 84	 // Determine where to redirect based on returnTo parameter or user role
 85	 if (returnTo === 'documents') {
 86	 // If coming from documents, redirect based on role
 87	 if (userRole === 'TENANT') {
 88	 router.push(`/documents/tenant/${id}`);
 89	 } else {
 90	 router.push(`/documents/${id}`);
 91	 }
 92	 } else if (returnTo === 'documents-tenant') {
 93	 // Tenant documents page
 94	 router.push(`/property/${id}/property-documents-tenant`);
 95	 } else if (returnTo) {
 96	 // If there's a custom returnTo, use it with property id
 97	 router.push(`${returnTo}/${id}`);
 98	 } else {
 99	 // Default behavior
 100	 router.push(`/property/${id}`);
 101	 }
 102	 };
 103	
 104	 if (loading) {
 105	 return (
 106	 <Flex minH="100vh" align="center" justify="center" bg="gray.50">
 107	 <Spinner size="xl" />
 108	 </Flex>
 109	 );
 110	 }
 111	
 112	 return (
 113	 <Flex direction="column" minH="100vh" bg="gray.50">
 114	 {/* Logo */}
 115	 <Box py={8}>
 116	 <HStack justify="center" spacing={3}>
 117	 <Image
 118	 src="/assets/images/RentMate_logo.png"
 119	 alt="RentMate logo"
 120	 h="40px"
 121	 objectFit="contain"
 122	 />
 123	 <Heading size="lg" fontWeight="semibold" color="teal.600">
 124	 RentMate
 125	 </Heading>
 126	 </HStack>
 127	 </Box>
 128	
 129	 {/* Main content */}
 130	 <Flex flex={1} justify="center" px={6}>
 131	 <Grid
 132	 templateColumns={{ base: "1fr", sm: "repeat(2, 1fr)", lg: "repeat(3, 1fr)" }}
 133	 gap={10}
 134	 maxW="1200px"
 135	 >
 136	 {properties.map((prop) => (
 137	 <Box
 138	 key={prop.id}
 139	 bg="white"
 140	 rounded="xl"
 141	 boxShadow="xl"
 142	 overflow="hidden"
 143	 transition="transform 0.2s"
 144	 _hover={{ transform: "translateY(-5px)" }}
 145	 >
 146	 <Image
 147	 src={prop.imageUrl || "/placeholder-house.jpg"}
 148	 alt={prop.address}
 149	 width="100%"
 150	 height="220px"
 151	 objectFit="cover"
 152	 />
 153	
 154	 <VStack spacing={4} p={5} align="stretch">
 155	 <HStack spacing={2}>
 156	 <FiMapPin size={18} color="#555" />
 157	 <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.700">
 158	 {prop.address}
 159	 </Text>
 160	 </HStack>
 161	
 162	 <Button
 163	 colorScheme="blue"
 164	 width="100%"
 165	 onClick={() => handleSelect(prop.id)}
 166	 >
 167	 Select
 168	 </Button>
 169	 </VStack>
 170	 </Box>
 171	 ))}
 172	 </Grid>
 173	 </Flex>
 174	 </Flex>
 175	 );
 176	}

 1	// pages/requests.js
 2	import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
 3	import {
 4	 Box,
 5	 Flex,
 6	 Heading,
 7	 Button,
 8	 Table,
 9	 Thead,
 10	 Tbody,
 11	 Tr,
 12	 Th,
 13	 Td,
 14	 Badge,

 16	 Text,
 17	 IconButton,
 18	 useToast,
 19	 Modal,
 20	 ModalOverlay,
 21	 ModalContent,

 24	 ModalFooter,
 25	 ModalCloseButton,
 26	 FormControl,
 27	 FormLabel,
 28	 Select,
 29	 Input,
 30	 Image,
 31	 SimpleGrid,
 32	 useDisclosure,
 33	} from "@chakra-ui/react";
 34	import { FiTrash2, FiCheckCircle, FiEye } from "react-icons/fi";
 35	
 36	const API_BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:8081/api";
 37	
 38	export default function MaintenanceRequestsPage() {
 39	 const toast = useToast();
 40	 const [requests, setRequests] = useState([]);
 41	 const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 42	 const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null);
 43	 const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure();
 44	 const [filters, setFilters] = useState({ status: "", priority: "", from: "", to: "" });
 45	
 46	 useEffect(() => {
 47	 fetchRequests();
 48	 }, []);
 49	
 50	 const fetchRequests = async () => {
 51	 setLoading(true);
 52	 try {
 53	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/maintenance-requests`);
 54	 if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to load maintenance requests");
 55	 const data = await res.json();
 56	 setRequests(Array.isArray(data) ? data : []);
 57	 } catch (e) {
 58	 console.error(e);
 59	 // No fallback sample data; keep empty on error
 60	 setRequests([]);
 61	 toast({ status: "error", title: "Failed to load maintenance requests" });
 62	 } finally {
 63	 setLoading(false);
 64	 }
 65	 };
 66	
 67	 const applyFilters = (items) => {
 68	 return items.filter((r) => {
 69	 if (filters.status && r.status !== filters.status) return false;
 70	 if (filters.priority && r.priority !== filters.priority) return false;
 71	 if (filters.from) {
 72	 const rf = new Date(filters.from).getTime();
 73	 const rr = r.request_date ? new Date(r.request_date).getTime() : 0;
 74	 if (rr < rf) return false;
 75	 }
 76	 if (filters.to) {
 77	 const rt = new Date(filters.to).getTime();
 78	 const rr = r.request_date ? new Date(r.request_date).getTime() : 0;
 79	 if (rr > rt) return false;
 80	 }
 81	 return true;
 82	 });
 83	 };
 84	
 85	 const markResolved = async (req) => {
 86	 try {
 87	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/maintenance-requests/${req.id}`, {
 88	 method: "PUT",
 89	 headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
 90	 body: JSON.stringify({ status: "Resolved", resolved_date: new Date().toISOString() }),
 91	 });
 92	 const updated = res.ok ? await res.json() : { ...req, status: "Resolved", resolved_date: new Date().toISOString() };
 93	 setRequests((prev) => prev.map((r) => (r.id === updated.id ? updated : r)));
 94	 toast({ status: "success", title: "Request marked resolved" });
 95	 } catch (e) {
 96	 console.error(e);
 97	 toast({ status: "error", title: "Failed to mark resolved" });
 98	 }
 99	 };
 100	
 101	 const deleteRequest = async (id) => {
 102	 if (!confirm("Delete this maintenance request?")) return;
 103	 try {
 104	 const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/maintenance-requests/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
 105	 if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to delete");
 106	 setRequests((prev) => prev.filter((r) => r.id !== id));
 107	 toast({ status: "success", title: "Request deleted" });
 108	 } catch (e) {
 109	 console.error(e);
 110	 setRequests((prev) => prev.filter((r) => r.id !== id));
 111	 toast({ status: "success", title: "Request deleted" });
 112	 }
 113	 };
 114	
 115	 const formatDate = (val) => {
 116	 if (!val) return "";
 117	 const d = new Date(val);
 118	 return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" });
 119	 };
 120	
 121	 const priorityBadge = (p) => {
 122	 const color = p === "High" ? "red" : p === "Medium" ? "orange" : "blue";
 123	 return (
 124	 <Badge colorScheme={color} px={3} py={1} rounded="full">{p || "Low"}</Badge>
 125	 );
 126	 };
 127	
 128	 const statusBadge = (s) => {
 129	 const map = { Open: "orange", Resolved: "green" };
 130	 const color = map[s] || "gray";
 131	 return (
 132	 <Badge colorScheme={color} px={3} py={1} rounded="full">{s || "Open"}</Badge>
 133	 );
 134	 };
 135	
 136	 const openPhotos = (req) => {
 137	 setSelected(req);
 138	 onOpen();
 139	 };
 140	
 141	 return (
 142	 <Box minH="100vh" bg="gray.50">
 143	 <Box maxW="1400px" mx="auto" p={8}>
 144	 <Flex justify="space-between" align="center" mb={6}>
 145	 <HStack spacing={3}>
 146	 <Heading size="lg">Maintenance Requests</Heading>
 147	 <Badge colorScheme="blue" fontSize="sm" px={3} py={1} rounded="full">
 148	 {requests.length} requests
 149	 </Badge>
 150	 </HStack>
 151	 <Button onClick={fetchRequests} colorScheme="blue">Refresh</Button>
 152	 </Flex>
 153	
 154	 {/* Filters */}
 155	 <Box bg="white" rounded="md" borderWidth="1px" borderColor="gray.200" p={4} mb={4}>
 156	 <SimpleGrid columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 4 }} spacing={4}>
 157	 <FormControl>
 158	 <FormLabel>Status</FormLabel>
 159	 <Select value={filters.status} onChange={(e) => setFilters({ ...filters, status: e.target.value })}>
 160	 <option value="">All</option>
 161	 <option value="Open">Open</option>
 162	 <option value="Resolved">Resolved</option>
 163	 </Select>
 164	 </FormControl>
 165	 <FormControl>
 166	 <FormLabel>Priority</FormLabel>
 167	 <Select value={filters.priority} onChange={(e) => setFilters({ ...filters, priority: e.target.value })}>
 168	 <option value="">All</option>
 169	 <option value="High">High</option>
 170	 <option value="Medium">Medium</option>
 171	 <option value="Low">Low</option>
 172	 </Select>
 173	 </FormControl>
 174	 <FormControl>
 175	 <FormLabel>From Date</FormLabel>
 176	 <Input type="date" value={filters.from} onChange={(e) => setFilters({ ...filters, from: e.target.value })} />
 177	 </FormControl>
 178	 <FormControl>
 179	 <FormLabel>To Date</FormLabel>
 180	 <Input type="date" value={filters.to} onChange={(e) => setFilters({ ...filters, to: e.target.value })} />
 181	 </FormControl>
 182	 </SimpleGrid>
 183	 </Box>
 184	
 185	 <Box bg="white" rounded="lg" shadow="sm" overflow="hidden">
 186	 <Table variant="simple">
 187	 <Thead bg="gray.50">
 188	 <Tr>
 189	 <Th>Description</Th>
 190	 <Th>Priority</Th>
 191	 <Th>Status</Th>
 192	 <Th>Property</Th>
 193	 <Th>Tenant</Th>
 194	 <Th>Request Date</Th>
 195	 <Th>Resolved Date</Th>
 196	 <Th>Photos</Th>
 197	 <Th></Th>
 198	 </Tr>
 199	 </Thead>
 200	 <Tbody>
 201	 {loading ? (
 202	 <Tr>
 203	 <Td colSpan={9} textAlign="center" py={8}>Loading...</Td>
 204	 </Tr>
 205	 ) : requests.length === 0 ? (
 206	 <Tr>
 207	 <Td colSpan={9} textAlign="center" py={8}>No maintenance requests found</Td>
 208	 </Tr>
 209	 ) : (
 210	 applyFilters(requests).map((req) => (
 211	 <Tr key={req.id} _hover={{ bg: "gray.50" }}>
 212	 <Td maxW="380px"><Text noOfLines={2}>{req.description}</Text></Td>
 213	 <Td>{priorityBadge(req.priority)}</Td>
 214	 <Td>{statusBadge(req.status)}</Td>
 215	 <Td>#{req.property_id}</Td>
 216	 <Td>
 217	 <HStack spacing={3} align="center">
 218	 {req.tenant_avatar ? (
 219	 <Image src={req.tenant_avatar} alt={req.tenant_name || `tenant-${req.tenant_id}`} boxSize="28px" rounded="full" objectFit="cover" />
 220	 ) : (
 221	 <Box w="28px" h="28px" rounded="full" bg="gray.200" />
 222	 )}
 223	 <Text fontWeight="medium">{req.tenant?.name || req.tenant_name || `#${req.tenant_id}`}</Text>
 224	 </HStack>
 225	 </Td>
 226	 <Td color="gray.600">{formatDate(req.request_date)}</Td>
 227	 <Td color="gray.600">{formatDate(req.resolved_date)}</Td>
 228	 <Td>
 229	 <HStack spacing={2}>
 230	 <Badge colorScheme="purple" rounded="full" px={2}>{(req.photos?.length || 0)} files</Badge>
 231	 {req.photos?.length ? (
 232	 <IconButton aria-label="View photos" icon={<FiEye />} size="sm" variant="ghost" onClick={() => openPhotos(req)} />
 233	 ) : null}
 234	 </HStack>
 235	 </Td>
 236	 <Td>
 237	 <HStack spacing={2}>
 238	 <IconButton aria-label="Mark resolved" icon={<FiCheckCircle />} size="sm" variant="ghost" colorScheme="green" onClick={() => markResolved(req)} />
 239	 <IconButton aria-label="Delete" icon={<FiTrash2 />} size="sm" variant="ghost" colorScheme="red" onClick={() => deleteRequest(req.id)} />
 240	 </HStack>
 241	 </Td>
 242	 </Tr>
 243	 ))
 244	 )}
 245	 </Tbody>
 246	 </Table>
 247	 </Box>
 248	 </Box>
 249	
 250	 {/* Photos Modal */}
 251	 <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} size="xl">
 252	 <ModalOverlay />
 253	 <ModalContent>
 254	 <ModalHeader>Photos</ModalHeader>
 255	 <ModalCloseButton />
 256	 <ModalBody>
 257	 {selected?.photos?.length ? (
 258	 <SimpleGrid columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3 }} spacing={4}>
 259	 {selected.photos.map((src, idx) => (
 260	 <Box key={idx} borderWidth="1px" borderColor="gray.200" rounded="md" overflow="hidden">
 261	 <Image src={src} alt={`photo-${idx}`} objectFit="cover" w="100%" h="200px" />
 262	 </Box>
 263	 ))}
 264	 </SimpleGrid>
 265	 ) : (
 266	 <Text>No photos</Text>
 267	 )}
 268	 </ModalBody>
 269	 <ModalFooter>
 270	 <Button onClick={onClose}>Close</Button>
 271	 </ModalFooter>
 272	 </ModalContent>
 273	 </Modal>
 274	 </Box>
 275	 );
 276	}

 25	export default function PropertiesPage() {
 26	 const [properties, setProperties] = useState([]);
 27	 const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 28	 const toast = useToast();
 29	
 30	 useEffect(() => {
 31	 fetchProperties();
 32	 }, []);
 33	
 34	 const fetchProperties = async () => {
 35	 setLoading(true);
 36	 try {
 37	 const data = await apiGet('/properties?size=20&page=0');
 38	 const list = Array.isArray(data)
 39	 ? data
 40	 : Array.isArray(data?.content)
 41	 ? data.content
 42	 : [];
 43	 setProperties(list);
 44	 } catch (e) {
 45	 console.error(e);
 46	 // Fallback to mock data for UI development if API fails
 47	 setProperties(mockProperties);
 48	 toast({ status: "info", title: "API failed, showing mock properties" });
 49	 } finally {
 50	 setLoading(false);
 51	 }
 52	 };
 53	
 54	 const handleSelect = (propertyId) => {
 55	 // Navigate to property details or perform action
 56	 toast({
 57	 status: "info",
 58	 title: `Property ${propertyId} selected`,
 59	 });
 60	 };
 61	
 62	 const handleRemove = async (propertyId) => {
 63	 if (!confirm("Are you sure you want to remove this property?")) return;
 64	
 65	 try {
 66	 await apiDelete(`/properties/${propertyId}`);
 67	 setProperties((prev) => prev.filter((p) => p.id !== propertyId));
 68	 toast({
 69	 status: "success",
 70	 title: "Property removed",
 71	 });
 72	 } catch (e) {
 73	 console.error(e);
 74	 toast({
 75	 status: "error",
 76	 title: "Failed to remove property",
 77	 });
 78	 }
 79	 };
 80	
 81	 return (
 82	 <Box minH="100vh" bg="gray.50">
 83	 <PageContainer>
 84	 <Flex justify="space-between" align="center" mb={6}>
 85	 <Heading size="lg">Properties</Heading>
 86	 <Button colorScheme="blue">New</Button>
 87	 </Flex>
 88	
 89	 {loading ? (
 90	 <SkeletonGrid count={6} />
 91	 ) : properties.length === 0 ? (
 92	 <EmptyState title="No properties found" description="Try adjusting your filters or check back later." />
 93	 ) : (
 94	 <SimpleGrid columns={{ base: 1, sm: 2, lg: 3 }} spacing={6}>
 95	 {properties.map((property) => (
 96	 <Property property={property} key={property.id} />
 97	 ))}
 98	 </SimpleGrid>
 99	 )}
 100	 </PageContainer>
 101	 </Box>
 102	 );
 103	}

 83	 <Text fontWeight="bold" fontSize="xl">{user.fullName}</Text>
 84	 <Text color="gray.500">{user.email}</Text>
 85	 <Divider my={6} />
 86	 <VStack as="nav" w="100%" spacing={2} align="stretch">
 87	 <SidebarButton icon={FiUser} label="Profile" isActive={activeTab === 'profile'} onClick={() => setActiveTab('profile')} />
 88	 <SidebarButton icon={FiShield} label="Security" isActive={activeTab === 'security'} onClick={() => setActiveTab('security')} />
 89	 <SidebarButton icon={FiFileText} label="Documents" isActive={activeTab === 'documents'} onClick={() => setActiveTab('documents')} />
 90	 <SidebarButton icon={FiLogOut} label="Sign Out" color="red.500" />
 91	 </VStack>
 92	 </Card>
 93	
 94	 {/* Right Content */}

 97	 {activeTab === 'security' && <SecurityContent />}

 99	 </Box>
 100	 </Flex>
 101	 </PageContainer>
 102	 );

 65	// --- Main Page Component ---
 66	export default function PaymentsPage() {
 67	 const canRender = useRequireAuth();
 68	 const router = useRouter();
 69	 const { leaseId } = router.query;
 70	 const [payments, setPayments] = useState([]);
 71	 const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 72	 const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure();
 73	
 74	 useEffect(() => {
 75	 setLoading(true);
 76	 setTimeout(() => {
 77	 setPayments(leaseId ? mockPayments : []);
 78	 setLoading(false);
 79	 }, 1000);
 80	 }, [leaseId]);
 81	
 82	 if (!canRender) return null;
 83	
 84	 const handleNewPayment = async (formData) => {
 85	 if (!leaseId) return;
 86	 try {
 87	 const payload = {
 88	 amount: parseFloat(formData.amount || 0),
 89	 paymentDate: formData.paymentDate || null,
 90	 type: formData.type || 'RENT',
 91	 paymentMethod: 'Online Portal', // Or get from form
 92	 description: formData.description || '',
 93	 };
 94	
 95	 const endpoint = role === 'TENANT' ? `/payments/lease/${leaseId}/pay` : `/payments/lease/${leaseId}`;
 96	 const newPayment = await apiPost(endpoint, payload);
 97	
 98	 setPayments((prev) => [newPayment, ...prev]);
 99	 toast({ status: 'success', title: 'Payment created' });
 100	 onClose();
 101	 } catch (err) {
 102	 toast({ status: 'error', title: 'Failed to create payment', description: err.message });
 103	 }
 104	 };
 105	
 106	 return (
 107	 <PageContainer>
 108	 <Flex justify="space-between" align="center" mb={6}>
 109	 <Heading size="lg">Payment History</Heading>
 110	 <Button colorScheme="blue" onClick={onOpen} isDisabled={!leaseId}>
 111	 Log a New Payment
 112	 </Button>
 113	 </Flex>
 114	
 115	 {loading ? (
 116	 <PaymentsSkeleton />
 117	 ) : !leaseId ? (
 118	 <Card p={10}>
 119	 <EmptyState
 120	 title="No Lease Selected"
 121	 description="Please select a lease to view its payment history. You can do this by navigating from a property's detail page or by adding a '?leaseId=...' to the URL."
 122	 />
 123	 </Card>
 124	 ) : payments.length === 0 ? (
 125	 <Card p={10}>
 126	 <EmptyState title="No Payments Found" description="There are no payment records for this lease yet." />
 127	 </Card>
 128	 ) : (
 129	 <Card overflowX="auto">
 130	 <Table variant="simple">
 131	 <Thead>
 132	 <Tr>
 133	 <Th>Description</Th>
 134	 <Th isNumeric>Amount</Th>
 135	 <Th>Status</Th>
 136	 <Th>Date</Th>
 137	 <Th>Payer</Th>
 138	 <Th>Actions</Th>
 139	 </Tr>
 140	 </Thead>
 141	 <Tbody>
 142	 {payments.map((p) => (
 143	 <Tr key={p.id}>
 144	 <Td fontWeight="medium">{p.description}</Td>
 145	 <Td isNumeric>${p.amount.toLocaleString()}</Td>
 146	 <Td><Badge colorScheme={p.status === 'COMPLETED' ? 'green' : 'orange'}>{p.status}</Badge></Td>
 147	 <Td>{new Date(p.paymentDate).toLocaleDateString()}</Td>
 148	 <Td>{p.payer.fullName}</Td>
 149	 <Td>
 150	 <IconButton icon={<FiEdit2 />} variant="ghost" size="sm" aria-label="Edit" />
 151	 <IconButton icon={<FiTrash2 />} variant="ghost" size="sm" colorScheme="red" aria-label="Delete" />
 152	 </Td>
 153	 </Tr>
 154	 ))}
 155	 </Tbody>
 156	 </Table>
 157	 </Card>
 158	 )}
 159	
 160	 {/* New Payment Modal */}
 161	 <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} isCentered>
 162	 <ModalOverlay />
 163	 <ModalContent>
 164	 <ModalHeader>Log a New Payment</ModalHeader>
 165	 <ModalCloseButton />
 166	 <ModalBody>
 167	 <VStack spacing={4}>
 168	 <FormControl isRequired>
 169	 <FormLabel>Description</FormLabel>
 170	 <Input name="description" onChange={handleChange} placeholder="e.g., Monthly Rent - January" />
 171	 </FormControl>
 172	 <FormControl isRequired>
 173	 <FormLabel>Amount</FormLabel>
 174	 <Input name="amount" type="number" onChange={handleChange} placeholder="2500.00" />
 175	 </FormControl>
 176	 <FormControl isRequired>
 177	 <FormLabel>Payment Date</FormLabel>
 178	 <Input name="paymentDate" type="date" onChange={handleChange} />
 179	 </FormControl>
 180	 <FormControl isRequired>
 181	 <FormLabel>Payment Type</FormLabel>
 182	 <Select name="type" onChange={handleChange} placeholder="Select type">
 183	 <option value="RENT">Rent</option>
 184	 <option value="DEPOSIT">Deposit</option>
 185	 <option value="LATE_FEE">Late Fee</option>
 186	 </Select>
 187	 </FormControl>
 188	 </VStack>
 189	 </ModalBody>
 190	 <ModalFooter>
 191	 <Button variant="ghost" mr={3} onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
 192	 <Button colorScheme="blue" onClick={handleSubmit}>Save Payment</Button>
 193	 </ModalFooter>
 194	 </ModalContent>
 195	 </Modal>
 196	 </PageContainer>
 197	 );
 198	}

 2	import { useRouter } from 'next/router';
 3	import {
 4	 Box,
 5	 Flex,
 6	 Heading,
 7	 Text,
 8	 Badge,
 9	 HStack,
 10	 VStack,
 11	 Image as ChakraImage,
 12	 Button,
 13	 useToast,
 14	 Divider,
 15	 SimpleGrid,

 17	 GridItem,

 23	} from '@chakra-ui/react';
 24	import { FaBed, FaBath, FaRulerCombined, FaCheckCircle } from 'react-icons/fa';
 25	import PageContainer from '../../src/components/ui/PageContainer';
 26	import Card from '../../src/components/ui/Card';

 30	
 31	// --- Skeleton Component for Loading State ---
 32	const PropertyDetailsSkeleton = () => (
 33	 <PageContainer maxW="1400px">
 34	 <Skeleton h={{ base: '250px', md: '500px' }} borderRadius="xl" mb={8} />
 35	 <Flex direction={{ base: 'column', lg: 'row' }} gap={10}>
 36	 <Box flex={3}>
 37	 <Skeleton h="45px" w="80%" mb={4} />
 38	 <Skeleton h="20px" w="60%" mb={6} />
 39	 <SkeletonText mt={6} noOfLines={6} spacing="4" />
 40	 </Box>
 41	 <Box flex={2}>
 42	 <Skeleton h="300px" borderRadius="xl" />
 43	 </Box>
 44	 </Flex>
 45	 </PageContainer>
 46	);
 47	
 48	// --- Main Page Component ---
 49	export default function PropertyDetailsPage() {
 50	 const router = useRouter();
 51	 const { id } = router.query;
 52	 const toast = useToast();
 53	 const { role } = useAuth();
 54	
 55	 const [property, setProperty] = useState(null);
 56	 const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 57	 const [managerEmail, setManagerEmail] = useState('');
 58	 const canManage = role === 'LANDLORD';
 59	
 60	 useEffect(() => {
 61	 if (!id) return;
 62	 const loadProperty = async () => {
 63	 setLoading(true);
 64	 try {
 65	 const data = await apiGet(`/properties/${id}`);
 66	 setProperty(data);
 67	 } catch (err) {
 68	 toast({ title: 'Error loading property', description: err.message, status: 'error' });
 69	 } finally {
 70	 setLoading(false);
 71	 }
 72	 };
 73	 loadProperty();
 74	 }, [id, toast]);
 75	
 76	 const assignManager = async () => {
 77	 if (!managerEmail) return;
 78	 try {
 79	 const updated = await apiPut(`/properties/${id}/manager`, { managerEmail });
 80	 setProperty(updated);
 81	 setManagerEmail('');
 82	 toast({ status: 'success', title: 'Manager assigned' });
 83	 } catch (err) {
 84	 toast({ status: 'error', title: 'Failed to assign manager', description: err.message });
 85	 }
 86	 };
 87	
 88	 const removeManager = async () => {
 89	 try {
 90	 const updated = await apiDelete(`/properties/${id}/manager`);
 91	 setProperty(updated);
 92	 toast({ status: 'success', title: 'Manager removed' });
 93	 } catch (err) {
 94	 toast({ status: 'error', title: 'Failed to remove manager', description: err.message });
 95	 }
 96	 };
 97	
 98	 const deleteProperty = async () => {
 99	 if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this property? This cannot be undone.')) return;
 100	 try {
 101	 await apiDelete(`/properties/${id}`);
 102	 toast({ status: 'success', title: 'Property deleted' });
 103	 router.push('/properties');
 104	 } catch (err) {
 105	 toast({ status: 'error', title: 'Failed to delete property', description: err.message });
 106	 }
 107	 };
 108	
 109	 if (loading) return <PropertyDetailsSkeleton />;
 110	 if (!property) return <PageContainer><Text>Property not found.</Text></PageContainer>;
 111	
 112	 const { title, address, rentAmount, status, roomAmount, description, photos = [], landlord, manager } = property;
 113	 const amenities = property.specs?.amenities || [];
 114	
 115	 return (
 116	 <PageContainer maxW="1400px">
 117	 <Grid
 118	 h={{ base: 'auto', md: '500px' }}
 119	 templateRows={{ base: 'repeat(2, 1fr)', md: 'repeat(2, 1fr)' }}
 120	 templateColumns={{ base: '1fr', md: 'repeat(4, 1fr)' }}
 121	 gap={3}
 122	 mb={8}
 123	 >
 124	 <GridItem rowSpan={{ base: 1, md: 2 }} colSpan={2}>
 125	 <ChakraImage src={photos[0]?.url || '/placeholder-property.jpg'} alt="Main property view" w="100%" h="100%" objectFit="cover" borderRadius="xl" />
 126	 </GridItem>
 127	 {photos.slice(1, 5).map((photo, i) => (
 128	 <GridItem key={photo.id || i} display={{ base: i > 1 ? 'none' : 'block', md: 'block' }}>
 129	 <ChakraImage src={photo.url} alt={`Property view ${i + 2}`} w="100%" h="100%" objectFit="cover" borderRadius="lg" />
 130	 </GridItem>
 131	 ))}
 132	 </Grid>
 133	
 134	 <Flex direction={{ base: 'column', lg: 'row' }} gap={10}>
 135	 <Box flex={3}>
 136	 <Heading as="h1" size="xl" letterSpacing="tight">{title}</Heading>
 137	 <Text color="gray.600" mt={2}>{address}</Text>
 138	
 139	 <HStack spacing={6} mt={4} color="gray.700">
 140	 {roomAmount && <HStack><Icon as={FaBed} mr={2} /> <Text>{roomAmount} Beds</Text></HStack>}
 141	 </HStack>
 142	
 143	 <Divider my={8} />
 144	
 145	 <Heading as="h2" size="lg" mb={4}>About this home</Heading>
 146	 <Text color="gray.700" whiteSpace="pre-wrap">{description}</Text>
 147	
 148	 {amenities.length > 0 && <Divider my={8} />}
 149	 {amenities.length > 0 && (
 150	 <>
 151	 <SectionHeader title="Amenities" subtitle="What this place offers" center={false} />
 152	 <SimpleGrid columns={{ base: 2, md: 3 }} spacing={4} color="gray.700">
 153	 {amenities.map(item => (
 154	 <HStack key={item}><Icon as={FaCheckCircle} color="green.500" /> <Text>{item}</Text></HStack>
 155	 ))}
 156	 </SimpleGrid>
 157	 </>
 158	 )}
 159	 </Box>
 160	
 161	 <Box flex={2} position="relative">
 162	 <Card p={6} position={{ lg: 'sticky' }} top="88px">
 163	 <Text fontSize="2xl" fontWeight="bold">
 164	 ${Number(rentAmount).toLocaleString()} <Text as="span" fontSize="md" color="gray.500">/ month</Text>
 165	 </Text>
 166	 <Badge colorScheme={status === 'AVAILABLE' ? 'green' : 'orange'} mt={2}>{status}</Badge>
 167	 <Button colorScheme="blue" size="lg" w="100%" mt={6}>Request a Tour</Button>
 168	 <Divider my={6} />
 169	
 170	 {landlord && (
 171	 <HStack mb={4}>
 172	 <Avatar name={landlord.fullName} src={landlord.avatarUrl} />
 173	 <Box>
 174	 <Text fontWeight="bold">{landlord.fullName}</Text>
 175	 <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500">Landlord</Text>
 176	 </Box>
 177	 </HStack>
 178	 )}
 179	
 180	 {manager && (
 181	 <HStack>
 182	 <Avatar name={manager.fullName} src={manager.avatarUrl} />
 183	 <Box>
 184	 <Text fontWeight="bold">{manager.fullName}</Text>
 185	 <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500">Property Manager</Text>
 186	 </Box>
 187	 </HStack>
 188	 )}
 189	
 190	 {canManage && (
 191	 <Box mt={6}>
 192	 <Divider my={6} />
 193	 <Heading size="sm" mb={3}>Admin Actions</Heading>
 194	 <VStack align="stretch" spacing={3}>
 195	 <HStack>
 196	 <Input placeholder="Manager email" value={managerEmail} onChange={(e) => setManagerEmail(e.target.value)} />
 197	 <Button colorScheme="blue" onClick={assignManager} whiteSpace="nowrap">Assign</Button>
 198	 </HStack>
 199	 <Button variant="outline" onClick={removeManager} isDisabled={!manager}>Remove Manager</Button>
 200	 <Button colorScheme="red" variant="outline" onClick={deleteProperty} mt={4}>Delete Property</Button>
 201	 </VStack>
 202	 </Box>
 203	 )}
 204	 </Card>
 205	 </Box>
 206	 </Flex>
 207	 </PageContainer>
 208	 );
 209	}
